project.name: course-dev-ide-with-agents
project.description: Collaborative intelligence infrastructure for course content production: a deterministic, manifest-compiled LangGraph multi-agent orchestrator (operator surface Marcus-SPOC) with 14+ specialist agents, HIL gates with DecisionCard verdicts, tamper-evident operator verdicts, learning ledger, operator HUD, and media-tool API clients.

nodes.name: chooser_html_emitter.py
nodes.summary: Renders the per-slide Storyboard-A A/B 'chooser' page for Section 07C as a single static, dependency-free HTML document that a client opens on gh-pages and a Playwright script can drive deterministically, emitting a SBA-{run_tag} selection code.
nodes.languageNotes: Pins a Playwright-stable DOM contract (data-slide/data-variant selectors, #copy-selections, #selection-code) that must not be renamed without updating the driver.

nodes.name: render_chooser_html
nodes.summary: Assembles the complete self-contained chooser HTML document from per-slide variant rows, embedded card markup, and the inline selection-code script.

nodes.name: capability_grounding.py
nodes.summary: Marcus's honesty spine for the S5 interlocutor: builds a FACT-bound grounding context from the S4 capability overlay so Marcus answers 'can you do X?' from the real dispatch graph, surfacing runtime-precondition blocks (e.g. missing research token) and stale-overlay disclosure.

nodes.name: CapabilityFact
nodes.summary: Per-specialist capability fact (state, rationale, routed nodes) with an honest_summary rendering that never up-levels the capability state.

nodes.name: GroundingContext
nodes.summary: Aggregated capability map for Marcus's LLM prompt; offers fact lookup per specialist and a render method producing the grounding text block.

nodes.name: research_token_precondition
nodes.summary: Derives the runtime-precondition flag for live research: wired in the dispatch graph but blocked at runtime while the scite OAuth token is absent.

nodes.name: build_grounding_context
nodes.summary: Loads the committed capability overlay and assembles the GroundingContext, attaching runtime-precondition flags and stale-overlay disclosure.

nodes.name: _shim_parser.py
nodes.summary: Shared argparse factory for the A2 single-decision gate shims: single source of truth for the shim CLI parser shape and the audience-layered OPERATOR/INPUTS/OUTPUTS/REFERENCE help text pinned by AC-7.7-B.

nodes.name: build_shim_parser
nodes.summary: Builds the per-gate argparse parser (trial-id, verdict-file, runs-root) with the length-pinned four-section help text shared by every gate shim.

nodes.name: g1_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision CLI shim for terminal gate G1: validates an OperatorVerdict file against the trial id, resumes the paused production trial, and prints a JSON status payload.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Parses and validates the OperatorVerdict, calls resume_production_trial for gate G1, and emits the sorted-key JSON result payload with exit-code semantics.

nodes.name: g2b_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision CLI shim for gate G2B (variant pick): validates an OperatorVerdict file, resumes the paused production trial, and prints a JSON status payload.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Parses and validates the OperatorVerdict, calls resume_production_trial for gate G2B, and emits the JSON result payload with exit-code semantics.

nodes.name: g2c_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision CLI shim for gate G2C: validates an OperatorVerdict file, resumes the paused production trial, and prints a JSON status payload.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Parses and validates the OperatorVerdict, calls resume_production_trial for gate G2C, and emits the JSON result payload with exit-code semantics.

nodes.name: g3_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision CLI shim for gate G3: validates an OperatorVerdict file, resumes the paused production trial, and prints a JSON status payload.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Parses and validates the OperatorVerdict, calls resume_production_trial for gate G3, and emits the JSON result payload with exit-code semantics.

nodes.name: g4_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision CLI shim for gate G4: validates an OperatorVerdict file, resumes the paused production trial, and prints a JSON status payload.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Parses and validates the OperatorVerdict, calls resume_production_trial for gate G4, and emits the JSON result payload with exit-code semantics.

nodes.name: g4a_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision CLI shim for gate G4A (voice pick): validates an OperatorVerdict file, resumes the paused production trial, and prints a JSON status payload.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Parses and validates the OperatorVerdict, calls resume_production_trial for gate G4A, and emits the JSON result payload with exit-code semantics.

nodes.name: marcus_interlocutor.py
nodes.summary: The LLM-driven stop-and-chat interlocution REPL (S5): at each paused gate Marcus narrates the real decision card in persona, holds a free-form turn loop with the operator via an injected chat model, confirms validated gate decisions, and drives resume_production_trial to the next gate.
nodes.languageNotes: Constructor-injected BaseChatModel DI seam (A4): offline tests inject a fake model and any live network call in the offline path raises rather than silently falling through.

nodes.name: StructuredAction
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for the LLM's structured turn output (action verb plus payload), with a parse classmethod that rejects malformed model responses.

nodes.name: ValidatedDecision
nodes.summary: A gate decision that passed guard validation, carrying the verb and payload plus a confirm_echo rendering used for the operator confirmation step.

nodes.name: MarcusInterlocutor
nodes.summary: The conversational engine: owns the chat model and grounding context, drives the gate-by-gate loop (_drive/_run_gate), asks and answers operator turns, confirms decisions, resumes the trial, and persists the transcript.

nodes.name: validate_action_against_gate
nodes.summary: Guard that validates a StructuredAction against the currently paused gate's legal verbs and payload shape, raising GuardRefusal on any mismatch.

nodes.name: run_marcus_interlocutor
nodes.summary: Programmatic entry point that constructs a MarcusInterlocutor with the supplied seams (chat model, IO, trial parameters) and runs the interlocution loop to completion.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point: parses arguments, normalizes the input source, warns on a stale capability overlay, and launches run_marcus_interlocutor.

nodes.name: marcus_spoc.py
nodes.summary: Marcus SPOC — the conversational single-point-of-contact operator surface over the production engine: at each gate it narrates the relevant content in persona (sources, ingestion, lesson plan, research, creative treatment, voice, G0 enrichment/refinement), collects the operator's decision, and drives production_runner under the hood; production_runner stays the runtime authority.
nodes.languageNotes: Structured conversational MVP: decisions arrive as a {gate_id: {verb, edit_payload}} map; free-form LLM turn-taking lives in marcus_interlocutor.py, not here.

nodes.name: narrate_kickoff_beat1
nodes.summary: Narrates the run-kickoff opening beat in Marcus persona, presenting the directive and trial framing before the first gate.

nodes.name: narrate_pick_recommendation
nodes.summary: Narrates the styleguide pick recommendation derived from the course's last recorded pick event.

nodes.name: narrate_research_result
nodes.summary: Narrates the research specialist's contribution (findings and citations) at the research gate in Marcus persona.

nodes.name: narrate_picker_publish_degrade
nodes.summary: Narrates a degraded picker-publish outcome with scrubbed error detail, telling the operator the inline fallback path is in effect.

nodes.name: narrate_inline_style_list
nodes.summary: Renders the numbered inline list of styleguide roster entries for the degraded (non-published) pick flow.

nodes.name: narrate_picker_preflight
nodes.summary: Narrates the picker preflight step: what will be published, where, and what the operator should expect to do.

nodes.name: decode_and_echo_pick
nodes.summary: Decodes a pasted picker selection code against the roster (with content-hash check) and echoes the resolved style back for operator confirmation.

nodes.name: commit_picker_pick
nodes.summary: Commits a confirmed styleguide pick: records the pick event, binds it to the run's Gamma settings, and returns the committed selection for downstream gates.

nodes.name: _CeremonyBudget
nodes.summary: Small counter guarding the paste/confirm ceremony loop: consumes attempts and reports exhaustion so the pick dialogue cannot loop forever.

nodes.name: _degraded_publish_pick
nodes.summary: Full degraded-mode pick flow when gh-pages publishing fails: narrates the degrade, presents the inline numbered style list, and runs the numbered-pick ceremony to a committed selection.

nodes.name: run_picker_preflight
nodes.summary: Drives the whole picker preflight ceremony: publish the picker page (or degrade inline), run the paste-confirm-commit loop, and return the operator's committed styleguide pick before the trial starts.

nodes.name: build_operator_verdict_kwargs
nodes.summary: Maps a per-gate conversational decision (verb plus edit payload) into the keyword arguments used to construct the OperatorVerdict for the resume call.

nodes.name: narrate_live_available_affordance
nodes.summary: Tells the operator when a live G0-enrichment leg is available for this run even though the offline mode is currently selected.

nodes.name: narrate_gate
nodes.summary: Central gate narration dispatcher: routes the paused gate's decision card to the matching narrator (sources, ingestion, lesson plan, treatment, voice, G0 enrichment/refinement) and renders it in persona.

nodes.name: run_plan_dialogue_preflight
nodes.summary: Runs the pre-trial lesson-plan dialogue preflight, letting the operator review and adjust plan-facing settings before the production walk begins.

nodes.name: run_marcus_spoc
nodes.summary: Top-level SPOC loop: starts or resumes the production trial, and at each pause narrates the gate, collects the mapped decision, builds the OperatorVerdict, and resumes until completion or a clean error-pause.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point: parses arguments (directive, decisions map, enrichment mode, picker options) and launches run_marcus_spoc with the resolved configuration.

nodes.name: coverage_annotation.py
nodes.summary: Coverage-annotation pass (T4): the AUTHORED side of the coverage interlock — one CoverageAnnotation per note-bearing component carrying re-segmented SourcePoint assertions, with an offline deterministic pass plus a live gpt-5 segmentation leg where the LLM only cuts verbatim spans; risk flags and coverage intents stay deterministic.
nodes.languageNotes: Live leg runs on a hard per-request-timeout OpenAI client; identity keys on the verbatim span so model paraphrase is never trusted (AC-OP2-DET).

nodes.name: CoverageAnnotation
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for one component's coverage annotation: the segmented source points plus block invariants and the v1-shippable check.

nodes.name: NonVerbatimSpan
nodes.summary: Diagnostic record for a span the live segmenter returned that could not be re-anchored verbatim in the source block.

nodes.name: detect_risk_flags
nodes.summary: Deterministically assigns risk flags (negation, comparator, numeric-precision style hazards) to a segmented span — never delegated to the LLM.

nodes.name: assert_v1_shippable
nodes.summary: Raises CoverageNotShippableError unless the annotation satisfies the v1 shippability contract.

nodes.name: detect_incomplete_segmentation
nodes.summary: Detects source blocks whose segmentation left uncovered residue, returning IncompleteSegment records for each gap.

nodes.name: assert_segmentation_complete
nodes.summary: Fail-loud wrapper over detect_incomplete_segmentation raising CoverageIncompleteError when residue remains.

nodes.name: reanchor_verbatim_span
nodes.summary: Re-anchors an LLM-returned span into the source block verbatim (tolerating straightened quotes), the determinism backbone of the live segmentation leg.

nodes.name: detect_non_verbatim_spans
nodes.summary: Collects NonVerbatimSpan diagnostics for live-leg spans that failed verbatim re-anchoring.

nodes.name: extract_coverage_rows
nodes.summary: Extracts the note-bearing component rows (id, type, locator, excerpt, slide key) from the enrichment corpus that the coverage pass will segment.

nodes.name: build_coverage_from_rows
nodes.summary: Builds CoverageAnnotation objects from extracted rows via the offline or live segmentation pass, assembling SourcePoints with deterministic ids, risk flags, and intents.

nodes.name: render_live_segmentation_prompt
nodes.summary: Renders the gpt-5 prompt instructing the model to cut verbatim spans only, for the live segmentation leg.

nodes.name: build_coverage_annotations
nodes.summary: Public entry point for the T4 pass: selects offline vs live segmentation, runs it over the extracted rows, and returns the annotations plus diagnostics.

nodes.name: coverage_gate.py
nodes.summary: Coverage fail-loud gate (T6) — the neutral gate logic that BLOCKs before audio spend iff a must-cover point is missing or verbatim-absent with no planned surface, derived from the CoverageReceipt; fuzzy cases stay WARN/ledger-only during the calibration window.
nodes.languageNotes: CoverageAssuranceError subclasses SpecialistDispatchError so the runner's existing error channel routes it through _pause_at_error — no parallel error channel.

nodes.name: CoverageAssuranceError
nodes.summary: SpecialistDispatchError subclass raised when the coverage gate blocks, carrying the blocking rows for the operator pause surface.

nodes.name: coverage_warnings
nodes.summary: Collects the WARN-tier (non-blocking) findings from a receipt: altered/risky containment and low-confidence anchored judgments.

nodes.name: evaluate_vacuous_receipt
nodes.summary: Detects receipts that pass vacuously (no joined rows, all deliberately excluded) so an empty join can never masquerade as full coverage.

nodes.name: assert_receipt_not_vacuous
nodes.summary: Fail-loud wrapper raising CoverageAssuranceError when the receipt is vacuous.

nodes.name: assert_coverage_gate
nodes.summary: The gate's teeth: raises CoverageAssuranceError with the blocking rows when any deterministically-certain must-cover failure exists.

nodes.name: coverage_receipt.py
nodes.summary: Coverage receipt (T5/T7) — the DERIVED two-axis ledger: per source point where it was carried (Axis A, coverage) joined with verbatim-containment status via Vera-R7 (Axis B), projected from joins that already exist at the dispatch site with no producer self-report channel; includes the render-time vouch_level honesty fuse.

nodes.name: AnchorResolution
nodes.summary: Result of resolving a source point's deterministic locator anchor against the run's deck/narration surfaces.

nodes.name: CoverageReceiptRow
nodes.summary: One receipt row joining coverage status, containment verdict, vouch level, and provenance for a single source point, with round-trip validators and the render-gate enforcement.

nodes.name: CoverageReceipt
nodes.summary: The full receipt artifact: rows plus grain stamp, missing-must-cover and vacuousness accessors, and a canonical SHA256 hash payload for tamper-evident persistence.

nodes.name: derive_coverage_receipt
nodes.summary: Derives the complete two-axis receipt from annotations plus anchors: resolves each point's anchor first (no anchor forces missing), derives coverage and containment rows, and assembles the CoverageReceipt.

nodes.name: coverage_plan_view
nodes.summary: Projects a receipt into the operator-facing plan view (per-slide grouping of coverage statuses) for reporting surfaces.

nodes.name: coverage_plan_view_from_dicts
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper building the plan view directly from raw receipt dicts loaded from disk.

nodes.name: g0_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: G0-enrichment artifact models (Story G0-S2): the frozen, operator-confirmable result of the Marcus-SPOC G0 pre-pass — typed source manifest, provisional Learning Objectives, A10 enumeration provenance and traversal roots, plus the anti-anchoring independent-parse sidecar and A3 dissent ledger.
nodes.languageNotes: Pydantic-v2 per repo checklist: extra=forbid, validate_assignment, tz-aware datetimes; audit sidecar fields use SkipJsonSchema + Field(exclude=True) so they never leak into serialization or the published schema.

nodes.name: Dissent
nodes.summary: A3 dissent-ledger entry recording where Marcus's independent parse disagreed with the merged view, with blank-rejection validation.

nodes.name: ReconcileView
nodes.summary: The reconciled merge of independent parse and operator merge with an enforced reconciliation invariant — the pattern the coverage receipt later reuses.

nodes.name: CitationResolution
nodes.summary: Per-citation resolution record with round-trip status validation and coherence enforcement between status and resolved fields.

nodes.name: G0EnrichmentResult
nodes.summary: The frozen top-level G0 artifact: typed manifest, provisional LOs (adequacy always None at this stage), provenance, dissent ledger, and a to_card_payload projection for the operator decision card.

nodes.name: assert_run_dissent_invariant
nodes.summary: Run-level guard asserting the dissent ledger is coherent with the reconciled view before the artifact is frozen.

nodes.name: irene_refinement.py
nodes.summary: Irene refinement artifacts plus the signed LO-delta contract (Story G0-S3): after confirm-gate G0E, Irene refines each provisional LO in place (same objective_id), emits advisory SourceAdequacy alerts that never block, and produces the reconcilable no-silent-drops delta ledger re-presented at ratify-gate G0R.

nodes.name: LODeltaEntry
nodes.summary: One signed LO-delta ledger entry (disposition code, PROPOSE-NEW / RECOMMEND-DROP channels) with channel well-formedness enforcement and an is_dropped accessor.

nodes.name: LODeltaLedger
nodes.summary: The reconcilable ledger over all delta entries enforcing count reconciliation and no-silent-drops, with summaries and the flagged-for-operator projection.

nodes.name: IreneRefinementResult
nodes.summary: Top-level refinement artifact enforcing that Irene never ratifies (operator-only transition), with a decision-card payload projection.

nodes.name: refine_one
nodes.summary: Refines a single provisional LO in place via advance_lo (provisional to refined, actor irene), populating bloom level and adequacy alert.

nodes.name: build_refinement_result
nodes.summary: Builds the full IreneRefinementResult over all provisional LOs (offline deterministic or live leg), assembling the signed delta ledger.

nodes.name: assert_completeness
nodes.summary: Completeness guard raising CompletenessError unless every G0 LO is accounted for in the ledger and adequacy fields are populated (advisory, never gating status).

nodes.name: ratify_refined_los
nodes.summary: Operator-side ratification at G0R: advances accepted refined LOs to ratified status, honoring the ledger's dispositions.

nodes.name: learning_objective.py
nodes.summary: Canonical Learning Objective entity plus lifecycle transition guard (Story G0-S1): the single source of truth for a provenance-anchored, lifecycle-aware LO, replacing (via adapters) the three legacy in-code LO representations; the learning_objective_map DB table keys on objective_id.

nodes.name: SourceRef
nodes.summary: Provenance anchor tying an LO to the source component/span it derives from, with empty-field rejection.

nodes.name: SourceAdequacy
nodes.summary: Advisory adequacy verdict (adequate/thin/gap) with missing-elements cardinality enforcement; never blocks the pipeline per ratification 3.1.

nodes.name: LearningObjective
nodes.summary: The canonical LO entity: immutable objective_id, statement, bloom level, status lifecycle (provisional/refined/ratified) with per-status invariant enforcement.

nodes.name: advance_lo
nodes.summary: The single sanctioned lifecycle transition guard: advances an LO between statuses only along legal actor-qualified edges, raising IllegalTransition otherwise.

nodes.name: learning_objective_adapters.py
nodes.summary: Pure adapter functions bridging the canonical LO entity to its three legacy representations (Irene statement string, workbook LearningObjectiveBrief, WorkbookSection binding), keeping the entity module's dependency graph acyclic; each adapter is deleted when its last native consumer is rewired.

nodes.name: from_irene_statement
nodes.summary: Builds a canonical LearningObjective from Irene Pass-1's bare statement string, coercing the bloom level and attaching provenance.

nodes.name: from_workbook_brief
nodes.summary: Converts a legacy workbook LearningObjectiveBrief into the canonical LO entity.

nodes.name: to_workbook_brief
nodes.summary: Projects a canonical LO back into the legacy LearningObjectiveBrief shape consumed by the workbook producer.

nodes.name: pedagogy_annotation.py
nodes.summary: Pedagogical annotation overlay (P3, Irene pass-1): an additive, never-gating overlay assigning each annotatable typed component a Bloom level, pedagogical role, deterministic teaches_after ordering, teachable verdict (from front-matter resolution_status only), and bounded rationale — with offline deterministic and live LLM passes.
nodes.languageNotes: One-way arrow architecture (Winston W7/W11): must not import app.marcus.orchestrator, gates modules, or g0_enrichment (which imports this class — a back-import would cycle).

nodes.name: PedagogyAnnotation
nodes.summary: Per-component pedagogy annotation model with round-trip Bloom/role validation, lo_ref format checks, bounded rationale, and tz enforcement.

nodes.name: compute_teaches_after
nodes.summary: Deterministically computes the teaches_after ordering across annotatable components from stable sort keys.

nodes.name: derive_teachable
nodes.summary: Derives the teachable verdict strictly from the component's front-matter resolution_status, never from citation_resolutions.

nodes.name: assert_p2_frontmatter_present
nodes.summary: Guard asserting every annotatable component carries the required P2 universal-md front-matter fields before P3 runs.

nodes.name: assert_pedagogy_referential_invariant
nodes.summary: Guard asserting every annotation references a real component and every lo_ref resolves to a known provisional LO.

nodes.name: assert_pedagogy_teachable_consistency
nodes.summary: Guard asserting annotation teachable verdicts stay consistent with the components' resolution statuses.

nodes.name: build_pedagogy_annotations
nodes.summary: Public entry point for the P3 pass: selects offline vs live annotation, runs it over annotatable components, and returns validated PedagogyAnnotation objects.

nodes.name: run_asset_index.py
nodes.summary: UDAC v1 Run Asset Index (RAI): the neutral ACCESS + USE contract both the orchestrator (which builds the index at ratification gates) and specialists (which consume the resolved view) import — canonical digests, the fail-loud resolve_asset resolver for ratified assets, and the RAI disk load/write pair.
nodes.languageNotes: Models-side placement (RESOLVE-ASSET-LIVES-NEUTRAL) so neither side violates Contract M3; coexists with the legacy fail-soft loaders per TWO-LOADERS-NOT-ONE.

nodes.name: RunAssetEntry
nodes.summary: One indexed asset: path, digest, algo, authority status, usage, and legacy-mode typing for a run artifact.

nodes.name: ResolvedAsset
nodes.summary: The consumer-facing resolved view of an asset after digest verification, carrying the loaded payload and provenance.

nodes.name: RunAssetIndex
nodes.summary: The RAI itself: entry lookup, mark_ratified authority transitions, additive re-pinning (repin_additive), and canonical JSON serialization.

nodes.name: recompute_digest_from_disk
nodes.summary: Recomputes an entry's digest from the on-disk artifact (structured canonical JSON or binary) for verification against the pinned digest.

nodes.name: compare_digests
nodes.summary: Compares pinned vs recomputed digests, producing the match/mismatch verdict used by the fail-loud resolver.

nodes.name: resolve_asset
nodes.summary: The NEW fail-loud resolver: once an asset is RATIFIED in the RAI, a consumer that cannot resolve or digest-match it gets AssetResolutionError; returns the ResolvedAsset view otherwise.

nodes.name: load_rai
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the RAI JSON artifact from the run directory.

nodes.name: source_point.py
nodes.summary: Source-point coverage models (T3): a SourcePoint is the atomic unit of the source-to-deliverable coverage axis — one teaching assertion produced by re-segmenting a slide's presentation-note block, identified as a child sub-locator of an existing TypedComponent with the parent component_id as the only sanctioned join key.
nodes.languageNotes: Identity keys on the verbatim source span (AC-OP2-DET); the #ordinal child id is never a join key — assert_join_key makes violations loud.

nodes.name: SourcePoint
nodes.summary: The atomic coverage assertion model: verbatim span, risk flags, coverage intents, segmentation provenance, with round-trip validators, invariant enforcement, and the parent_join_key accessor.

nodes.name: make_source_point_id
nodes.summary: Constructs the canonical child id component_id#ordinal, the only sanctioned way to mint a source point identity.

nodes.name: assert_join_key
nodes.summary: Guard that raises when a downstream join is attempted on the child #ordinal id instead of the parent component_id.

nodes.name: derive_coverage_intents
nodes.summary: Deterministically derives the coverage intents (must_cover and surface expectations) for a segmented span from its type and risk profile.

nodes.name: source_type.py
nodes.summary: Closed source-TYPE taxonomy for the G0-enrichment brick: a 10-type closed enum plus other:<label> escape hatch, recorded independently of the operator's DirectiveRole binding — TYPE answers 'what kind of artifact', role answers 'how should the deck pipeline treat it'.
nodes.languageNotes: Closed enum gets triple red-rejection: Pydantic Literal validator, JSON-Schema enum array, and the escape-hatch flag enforcement.

nodes.name: OtherSourceType
nodes.summary: The other:<label> escape-hatch type with blank-label rejection, used when a span fits none of the 10 closed types.

nodes.name: TypedSource
nodes.summary: A typed source file/artifact with unknown-type rejection and escape-hatch flag enforcement (classification-only types surfaced flagged).

nodes.name: TypedComponent
nodes.summary: A typed component within a source (the segmentation parent of SourcePoints), carrying locator, ordinal, and resolution fields with the same closed-enum enforcement.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Marcus-Orchestrator package root (4A conversation loop + plan-lock commit + downstream fan-out): re-exports routing and supervisor pieces and defines the NegotiatorSeam; internal-only — Maya interacts through the single Marcus facade, never this package.

nodes.name: NegotiatorSeam
nodes.summary: Named seam descriptor for the negotiation boundary between the conversation orchestrator and downstream components, with a readable str rendering.

nodes.name: chooser_publisher.py
nodes.summary: Publishes the per-slide Storyboard-A A/B chooser to GitHub Pages at gate G2B: renders the chooser page from Gary's per-slide PNGs and pushes a self-contained pack to gh-pages so the client picks slide-by-slide; the copied selection code returns as the G2B verdict's slide_variant_selections.

nodes.name: publish_chooser_for_gate
nodes.summary: End-to-end G2B publish: assembles per-slide A/B options from the run's variant PNGs, renders the chooser HTML, and pushes the pack to the gh-pages publish dir, raising ChooserPublishError on failure.

nodes.name: conversation_persistence.py
nodes.summary: Conversation turn persistence with a tamper-evident SHA256 chain: canonical JSON digests link each per-gate turn file to its predecessor, with ordered loading and full-chain verification.

nodes.name: compute_turn_digest
nodes.summary: Computes the canonical SHA256 digest of a turn (payload plus previous-digest link), the chain's core primitive.

nodes.name: latest_turn_digest
nodes.summary: Returns the digest of the most recent persisted turn for a gate, used to link the next turn into the chain.

nodes.name: load_turn
nodes.summary: Loads and coerces a persisted turn file including its embedded decision card.

nodes.name: write_turn
nodes.summary: Persists one conversation turn: assigns the next index, computes the chained digest, and writes the canonical JSON turn file for the gate.

nodes.name: verify_chain
nodes.summary: Walks all persisted turns in order and re-verifies every digest link, raising ConversationChainBrokenError on any tamper or gap.

nodes.name: coverage_anchors.py
nodes.summary: Step 0 pure core of the coverage join (FORK A): offline-testable slide_key reconciliation — the primary final_slide_id-to-slide_key map from the slide_briefs source_ref lineage, plus the pure anchor-projection core where reconciliation is passed in, never computed from run-state.
nodes.languageNotes: M3-clean: replicates the enhanced-vo.1 lineage mapping rather than cross-importing app.specialists; re-refinement drift is omitted, never guessed.

nodes.name: resolve_slide_key_map
nodes.summary: Builds the primary {final_slide_id: slide_key} map from the explicit slide_briefs source_ref to plan_units lineage; briefs whose source_ref is not in the plan are omitted.

nodes.name: resolve_slide_key_lineage
nodes.summary: Extends the slide-key map with lineage detail (which source ordinal each clustered final segment descends from) for diagnostics and reporting.

nodes.name: build_coverage_anchors
nodes.summary: The pure reconciliation core: joins deck rows and narration rows into per-slide_key coverage anchors, handling off-by-one, missing-key, collision, and empty-input adversarial cases offline.

nodes.name: coverage_gate_wiring.py
nodes.summary: Coverage gate orchestrator wiring (T6): owns the env feature-flag (default OFF), disk-primary receipt I/O, and the both-walks seam-callable invoked at the shared dispatch site before the audio-spending specialist, routing CoverageAssuranceError through the runner's existing error channel.

nodes.name: mark_coverage_receipt_expected
nodes.summary: Drops the past-G3 marker file signalling a receipt is now expected, so later derive failures still trip the fail-loud gate.

nodes.name: write_coverage_receipt
nodes.summary: Persists the derived CoverageReceipt to its canonical run-dir path as the disk-primary artifact.

nodes.name: note_bearing_content_exists
nodes.summary: Checks whether the run's enrichment corpus contains any note-bearing components at all, so the gate can distinguish 'nothing to cover' from a silently-skipped pass.

nodes.name: enforce_coverage_gate_before_audio
nodes.summary: The both-walks seam-callable: when the flag is on and a receipt is expected, loads it from disk and runs the vacuousness and coverage asserts before any ElevenLabs/Descript spend.

nodes.name: coverage_runner.py
nodes.summary: Runner-integration glue for the G3 coverage seam (Step 3 render + Step 4 derive/write): the one shared helper both walk sites call at G3 — drops the receipt-expected marker first, loads authored annotations, marshals the run's own deck and narration surfaces into anchors, derives and writes the receipt, and renders coverage-report.html.

nodes.name: _select_plan_units
nodes.summary: Selects the authoritative lesson-plan units among candidate payloads for the slide-key lineage join.

nodes.name: _marshal_coverage_surfaces
nodes.summary: Marshals the run's deck rows (gary-dispatch-payload.json) and narration rows (segment-manifest-storyboard-b.yaml) plus the slide-key map into the anchor inputs for the pure reconciliation core.

nodes.name: _write_coverage_report_html
nodes.summary: Renders the standalone coverage-report.html from the derived receipt and links it for the operator.

nodes.name: _derive_and_write_coverage_receipt
nodes.summary: The one shared G3 helper both walk sites call: marker first, load annotations, marshal surfaces, derive the receipt idempotently, write the canonical RAI artifact, and render the report.

nodes.name: dispatch_adapter.py
nodes.summary: Production composition adapter for scaffolded specialists: builds specialist state from upstream contributions, compiles the specialist's LangGraph graph with an in-memory checkpointer, invokes it, and extracts the contribution output while asserting the payload duality boundary.

nodes.name: ProductionDispatchAdapter
nodes.summary: The adapter class: resolves specialist aliases, builds specialist state and payloads from dependencies, dynamically loads and compiles the specialist's graph builders, invokes the compiled graph, and extracts output plus the model used.

nodes.name: enrichment_consumption.py
nodes.summary: Orchestrator-side consumption layer that projects the frozen, operator-confirmed G0EnrichmentResult (typed components, pedagogy annotations, provisional LOs) into deterministic deck and narration seams: per-slide role-derived voice directions and a deck enrichment hint.

nodes.name: rhetorical_role_for_pedagogical_role
nodes.summary: Maps a pedagogical role from the enrichment taxonomy to its rhetorical-role counterpart used by the voice pipeline.

nodes.name: role_to_voice_direction
nodes.summary: Translates a pedagogical role into a concrete voice-direction seed for the narration channel.

nodes.name: slide_ordinal_from_locator
nodes.summary: Extracts the 1-based slide ordinal from a document-hierarchy locator string.

nodes.name: source_slide_ordinals
nodes.summary: Collects the set of slide ordinals referenced by typed components in a frozen G0 enrichment card payload.

nodes.name: project_role_derived_voice_by_slide
nodes.summary: Consumer A of the P5 loop: projects per-slide role-derived voice-direction seeds from narration components carrying a pedagogical_role.

nodes.name: _candidate_narration_seeds_by_ordinal
nodes.summary: Groups candidate narration voice seeds by slide ordinal, preserving provenance so ambiguity can be detected downstream.

nodes.name: project_ambiguous_narration_ordinals
nodes.summary: Reports the slide ordinals whose narration components map to more than one conflicting voice-direction seed.

nodes.name: project_deck_enrichment_hint
nodes.summary: Consumer B of the P5 loop: derives a sanitized deck-level enrichment hint statement from the frozen enrichment payload for downstream deck generation.

nodes.name: g0_enrichment_wiring.py
nodes.summary: G0-enrichment runner-wired orchestration hook: an off-critical-path LLM pre-pass that segments enumerated corpus files into typed components and extracts provisional Learning Objectives, frozen and cached against a corpus fingerprint for replay determinism, with offline and live modes plus pedagogy/coverage annotation attachment.

nodes.name: resolve_enrichment_mode
nodes.summary: Resolves whether G0 enrichment runs in live LLM mode or offline deterministic mode from environment settings and the model id.

nodes.name: g0_enrichment_active
nodes.summary: Feature-flag check reporting whether the G0 enrichment pre-pass is active for the current run.

nodes.name: _resolve_citation_resolutions
nodes.summary: Resolves citation references in typed components against enumerated sources, optionally dispatching live resolution.

nodes.name: _build_pedagogy_frontmatter
nodes.summary: Builds the pedagogy frontmatter block combining typed components, citation resolutions, and provisional LOs for the annotation pass.

nodes.name: _attach_pedagogy_annotations
nodes.summary: Attaches pedagogy annotations to typed components by invoking the lesson-plan pedagogy annotation builder in offline or live mode.

nodes.name: _build_coverage_frontmatter
nodes.summary: Builds the coverage frontmatter block from typed components, pedagogy annotations, and LOs for the coverage annotation pass.

nodes.name: _attach_coverage_annotations
nodes.summary: Attaches coverage annotations to typed components via the lesson-plan coverage builder, collecting non-verbatim span diagnostics.

nodes.name: _split_components
nodes.summary: Deterministically splits a source file's text into candidate typed components with hierarchy locators for the offline pre-pass.

nodes.name: _file_components
nodes.summary: Produces the typed component rows for a single enumerated corpus file, including verbatim excerpts and locators.

nodes.name: _live_corpus_summary
nodes.summary: Assembles the corpus summary text sent to the live LLM extraction call, filtering operational non-content files.

nodes.name: flag_ungrounded_components
nodes.summary: Groundedness audit: flags typed components whose verbatim excerpt cannot be found in the referenced source text.

nodes.name: _offline_pre_pass
nodes.summary: Deterministic offline variant of the G0 pre-pass: rule-based segmentation and LO extraction without any LLM call.

nodes.name: _build_dissent
nodes.summary: Constructs the dissent record comparing independent parses against the merged view, bound to the corpus fingerprint.

nodes.name: G0EnrichmentParseError
nodes.summary: Fail-loud exception raised when the live LLM extraction response cannot be parsed into the expected enrichment payload.

nodes.name: _salvage_array
nodes.summary: Best-effort recovery of a named JSON array from a truncated or malformed LLM response body.

nodes.name: _parse_live_extraction_response
nodes.summary: Parses the live LLM extraction response into component and LO arrays, with salvage paths for truncated payloads and fail-loud errors otherwise.

nodes.name: _default_extraction_chat_factory
nodes.summary: Constructs the default chat-model factory used for the live G0 extraction call.

nodes.name: _live_pre_pass
nodes.summary: Live LLM variant of the G0 pre-pass: renders the corpus summary prompt, invokes the chat model, and parses typed components plus provisional LOs.

nodes.name: _coerce_component_row
nodes.summary: Coerces one raw LLM component row into the typed-component schema, normalizing type labels and parent relations.

nodes.name: _parse_live_payload
nodes.summary: Validates and materializes the full live extraction payload against the enumerated corpus, enforcing source-reference and locator invariants.

nodes.name: build_enrichment_result
nodes.summary: Top-level builder that runs the offline or live pre-pass, attaches pedagogy and coverage annotations, and assembles the frozen G0EnrichmentResult keyed to the corpus fingerprint.

nodes.name: run_g0_enrichment
nodes.summary: Runner-wired node handler: caches or rebuilds the enrichment result for a trial run, persists it to the run directory, and records the contribution in the production envelope.

nodes.name: gate_runner.py
nodes.summary: Shared gate-runner guardrails: calibration tripwire evaluation on operator-override history, engagement-decay reporting across trial quartiles, and the Marcus-duality boundary assertion.

nodes.name: evaluate_calibration_tripwire
nodes.summary: Evaluates whether the operator-override history at a gate trips the calibration tripwire and writes the tripwire artifact when it fires.

nodes.name: emit_engagement_decay_report
nodes.summary: Compares first-quartile and last-quartile trial events and emits an engagement-decay report artifact when the ratio falls below the floor.

nodes.name: assert_marcus_duality_boundary
nodes.summary: Asserts the orchestrator-mode and operator-handoff states never overlap, raising MarcusDualityBoundaryError on violation.

nodes.name: gh_pages_publish.py
nodes.summary: Shared GitHub Pages publish helper consolidating the clone-stage-commit-push transport with three fail-loud hygiene guards: retention pruning by pack age, published-size projection against the 1 GB Pages cap, and verify-after-push liveness checks.

nodes.name: _git
nodes.summary: Runs a git subcommand in the clone directory with token scrubbing of output and fail-loud error mapping.

nodes.name: prune_retention
nodes.summary: Deletes managed packs older than the configured max age by git committer date, honoring a protected allowlist and never pruning the pack currently being published.

nodes.name: project_published_size
nodes.summary: Projects the post-publish site size and refuses the publish (SizeGuardRefusal) when it would exceed the GitHub Pages published-site cap.

nodes.name: _verify_page_live
nodes.summary: Polls the published URL and the Pages build API until the page is live or the timeout expires, raising a tagged error on failure.

nodes.name: _default_pages_build_checker
nodes.summary: Queries the GitHub Pages build API for the site repo and maps the response into a build-status verdict.

nodes.name: verify_build_after_push
nodes.summary: Public verify-after-push entry: confirms the pushed pack is actually served (URL liveness plus Pages build status) before declaring the publish successful.

nodes.name: git_publish_dir
nodes.summary: Core transport: clones the site repo, stages the sanitized pack under a subdir, applies retention and size-guard hygiene, commits, pushes, and returns the publish URL.

nodes.name: load_hygiene_config
nodes.summary: Loads retention, size-guard, and verify configuration for the publisher from the publisher-config mapping.

nodes.name: irene_refinement_wiring.py
nodes.summary: Irene-refinement runner-wired hook: after operator gate G0E confirms provisional Learning Objectives, refines each in place (provisional to refined with bloom level and adequacy) and emits the signed LO-delta contract into the run directory.

nodes.name: _load_confirmed_provisional_los
nodes.summary: Loads the gate-confirmed provisional LearningObjectives from the frozen g0-enrichment.json in the run directory.

nodes.name: build_result_for_run
nodes.summary: Builds the IreneRefinementResult for a run directory by refining its confirmed provisional LOs in offline or live mode.

nodes.name: run_irene_refinement
nodes.summary: Runner-wired node handler: refines confirmed LOs, persists the refinement result and LO-delta ledger to the run directory, and records the contribution in the production envelope.

nodes.name: load_refinement_full
nodes.summary: Loads the persisted full refinement result from a run directory for downstream consumers.

nodes.name: package_builders.py
nodes.summary: S3 pre-dispatch package builders: pure deterministic transforms (no LLM) that project a ratified lesson plan plus creative directive into the exact payload vocabulary a downstream specialist consumes, notably Gary's slide briefs, under a generation lock.

nodes.name: BuilderInputError
nodes.summary: Fail-loud exception carrying structured detail when a builder's upstream envelope inputs are missing or malformed.

nodes.name: build_gary_briefs
nodes.summary: Mechanically projects the ratified lesson plan, creative-directive settings, and deck enrichment hint into Gary's per-slide brief payload keyed to the locked vocabulary.

nodes.name: run_builder_node
nodes.summary: Runner-invoked builder node entry that acquires the pass-1 generation lock and delegates to the locked builder body.

nodes.name: _run_builder_node_locked
nodes.summary: Locked builder body: validates plan authority and slide authority, builds the Gary brief payload, and records the builder contribution in the production envelope.

nodes.name: picker_html_emitter.py
nodes.summary: Static gh-pages styleguide Picker emitter and selection-code decoder: renders a dependency-free card-grid page the operator opens on the public site, and decodes the pasted selection code back into styleguide picks for the run directive.

nodes.name: build_selection_code
nodes.summary: Builds the human-copyable selection code encoding the run tag and picked styleguide slugs.

nodes.name: decode_picker_selection_code
nodes.summary: Decodes and validates a pasted selection code against the expected run tag and the SSOT roster, returning the A/B styleguide pick mapping and failing loud on any mismatch.

nodes.name: _static_thumbnail
nodes.summary: Resolves a roster entry's thumbnail to a static relative path suitable for the published pack.

nodes.name: _render_static_card
nodes.summary: Renders one styleguide roster entry as a static HTML card with thumbnail and metadata.

nodes.name: _page_js
nodes.summary: Emits the inline JavaScript that drives pick state, version selection, and selection-code construction on the static picker page.

nodes.name: render_picker_static_html
nodes.summary: Renders the complete static picker page (cards, styles, inline JS) for a roster and run tag, ready to publish as a self-contained gh-pages pack.

nodes.name: picker_publisher.py
nodes.summary: Publishes the styleguide Picker to GitHub Pages as a static interactive pack (index.html plus thumbnails), delegating transport, sanitation, and verify-after-push to the shared gh_pages_publish module.

nodes.name: publish_picker
nodes.summary: Builds the self-contained picker pack (rendered HTML plus thumbnail copies), publishes it to the gh-pages site via the shared transport, and optionally verifies the page is live after push.

nodes.name: pre_gate_marcus.py
nodes.summary: Shared single-LLM-call node invoked before each conversational pause gate (G1, G2C, G3, G4): renders a template-with-slots prompt and emits a structured PreFillProposal the runner threads into the decision card's drafted proposal.

nodes.name: invoke_pre_gate_marcus
nodes.summary: Renders the per-gate Jinja prompt with slot values, invokes the Marcus chat model once, and parses the response into a PreFillProposal.

nodes.name: production_runner.py
nodes.summary: The production-graph runner composition layer: walks the compiled pipeline manifest node by node, dispatches specialists, pauses at operator gates with decision cards, checkpoints and resumes/recovers trials, enforces budget and preflight guards, and emits traces, cost reports, and operator-surface artifacts. Core of the Marcus-SPOC runtime.
nodes.languageNotes: Two distinct node walks exist (start walk stopping at G1 and the continuation walk); gate-crossing side-effects are duplicated deliberately in both.

nodes.name: write_prewalk_settings_confirm_sentinel
nodes.summary: Writes the sentinel file marking that the pre-walk settings gate was confirmed for a run.

nodes.name: _operator_surface_cost_reading
nodes.summary: Derives the live cost reading tile for the operator surface from persisted cost artifacts and run state.

nodes.name: _operator_surface_health_tiles
nodes.summary: Builds the health tiles shown on the operator HUD surface from trial run-state signals.

nodes.name: _operator_surface_specialist_roster
nodes.summary: Assembles the specialist roster view (who ran, who is pending) for the operator surface from run state.

nodes.name: _operator_surface_modalities
nodes.summary: Derives the active output modalities summary for the operator surface from run artifacts and state.

nodes.name: emit_registered_and_terminal_trace
nodes.summary: Emits a registered LangSmith-style trace event for terminal trial outcomes (completed, cancelled, errored) with run metadata.

nodes.name: _run_start_preflight_gate
nodes.summary: Run-start preflight gate: validates HUD availability, producer process, and run-dir preconditions, raising PreflightGateFailed to block the trial before any spend.

nodes.name: _fallback_cost_report
nodes.summary: Builds a minimal fallback economics report when live cost measurement is unavailable for a trial.

nodes.name: _trace_run
nodes.summary: Constructs a child trace-run record for a specialist invocation carrying model, token, and economics evidence.

nodes.name: _trace_run_for_contribution
nodes.summary: Builds a trace-run record from a recorded specialist contribution, recovering token and model evidence from its output.

nodes.name: _trace_run_for_pre_gate_marcus
nodes.summary: Builds the trace-run record for a pre-gate-marcus proposal call so its spend is visible in the trial trace.

nodes.name: _voice_candidates
nodes.summary: Extracts the candidate voice options from envelope contributions for presentation on the voice-selection gate card.

nodes.name: _variant_candidates
nodes.summary: Extracts the candidate deck variants from envelope contributions for the variant-selection gate card.

nodes.name: _build_decision_card
nodes.summary: Builds the per-gate DecisionCard presented to the operator: pending nodes, artifact paths, candidate selections, drafted pre-fill proposal, and run-settings context, validated against the gate's card schema.

nodes.name: _persist_conversation_turn_if_possible
nodes.summary: Persists the gate decision card as a hash-chained conversation turn in the run directory, tolerating persistence failure without blocking the walk.

nodes.name: _pack_hash_binding
nodes.summary: Computes the pack-hash binding tying the run to its composed manifest and component selection for anti-drift parity.

nodes.name: _emit_run_summary_yaml
nodes.summary: Writes the run-summary YAML artifact capturing terminal gate, manifest binding, trace id, and bypass events for the trial.

nodes.name: _write_checkpoint
nodes.summary: Persists the walk checkpoint (node index, gate, run state, envelope, manifest binding) enabling resume and recover flows.

nodes.name: _ensure_decision_card_registered_from_disk
nodes.summary: Re-registers a persisted decision card from the run directory into the resume registry so a resumed verdict can be validated against it.

nodes.name: _merge_selection_into_envelope
nodes.summary: Merges an operator gate selection into the production envelope, failing loud on unknown selection keys.

nodes.name: _apply_per_slide_variant_selection
nodes.summary: Applies the operator's per-slide variant picks from run state onto the production envelope, enforcing total coverage.

nodes.name: _apply_deckwide_variant_selection
nodes.summary: Applies a single deck-wide variant selection from run state onto the production envelope, pruning unselected variants.

nodes.name: _apply_verdict_to_run_state
nodes.summary: Applies an OperatorVerdict (approve, edit, reject) to run state, recording the override history used by the calibration tripwire.

nodes.name: _apply_g0r_ratification
nodes.summary: Ratifies the refined Learning Objectives after the G0R gate clears by promoting the refinement result in the run directory.

nodes.name: _record_cost
nodes.summary: Measures the trial's cost from its trace root and persists the economics report to the run directory.

nodes.name: apply_llm_execution_mode_overlay
nodes.summary: Overlays the run's LLM execution mode (interactive vs provider-batch) onto a specialist's runner payload.

nodes.name: _runner_payload_for_specialist
nodes.summary: Composes the full runner payload for a specialist dispatch: directive-derived Gamma settings, styleguide resolution, per-slide directives, export dirs, and chartered parity context keys.

nodes.name: _scripted_min_cluster_floor_for_record
nodes.summary: Derives the scripted minimum-cluster floor for a styleguide record used in clustering-aware deck generation.

nodes.name: _min_cluster_floor_from_directive
nodes.summary: Reads the minimum-cluster floor from the run directive's styleguide resolution, falling back to scripted defaults.

nodes.name: _trial_start_directive_digest
nodes.summary: Recovers the trial-start attestation digest of the directive bytes from trial-start.json for parity auditing.

nodes.name: _invoke_specialist_with_retry
nodes.summary: Invokes a specialist through the dispatch adapter with a bounded retry policy for transient failures.

nodes.name: _pause_at_gate
nodes.summary: Pauses the walk at an operator gate: invokes pre-gate-marcus for a drafted proposal, builds and registers the decision card, persists the conversation turn and checkpoint, and returns the paused trial envelope.

nodes.name: _prewalk_settings_gate_disposition
nodes.summary: Decides whether the pre-walk settings gate should pause this run based on sentinels, pause flags, and offline mode.

nodes.name: _pause_at_prewalk_settings
nodes.summary: Pauses the run before the first node at the pre-walk settings gate so the operator can confirm run settings before spend.

nodes.name: _dispatch_specialist_at_node
nodes.summary: Shared walk-invariant dispatch site: resolves dependency maps and consumed assets (UDAC), enforces the research-detective gate before Irene Pass-2, composes the runner payload, and invokes the specialist with retry.

nodes.name: _pause_at_error
nodes.summary: Converts a specialist dispatch error into a paused, resumable trial state with an error decision card instead of aborting the run.

nodes.name: _pause_at_provider_batch
nodes.summary: Pauses the trial while a provider-side LLM batch is in flight, persisting a checkpoint that resume_batch can poll and continue from.

nodes.name: _dispatch_specialist_catching_batch_wait
nodes.summary: Wraps specialist dispatch to catch WaitingForProviderBatchError and route it into the provider-batch pause path.

nodes.name: _assert_specialist_dispatched_or_raise
nodes.summary: Fail-loud guard asserting a specialist actually dispatched (or offline mode is explicitly allowed) so silent no-op walks cannot masquerade as evidence.

nodes.name: _assert_within_dollar_budget_or_raise
nodes.summary: Enforces the per-trial dollar budget before each dispatch, raising with accumulated-spend evidence when the cap would be exceeded.

nodes.name: run_production_trial
nodes.summary: Primary trial entry point: compiles the manifest, runs preflight, then walks nodes dispatching specialists and orchestration hooks (builders, G0 enrichment, Irene refinement, research wiring) until the first operator gate pauses the run.

nodes.name: _resume_prewalk_settings
nodes.summary: Resumes a trial paused at the pre-walk settings gate: applies the operator's settings verdict and re-enters the walk from node zero.

nodes.name: resume_production_trial
nodes.summary: Resumes a gate-paused trial from its checkpoint by validating the operator verdict against the registered decision card, applying it to run state, and continuing the walk.

nodes.name: resume_batch_production_trial
nodes.summary: Resumes a trial paused on a provider-side LLM batch: polls the batch via the adapter, folds completed results into the envelope, and continues the walk.

nodes.name: recover_production_trial
nodes.summary: Recovers an interrupted trial from its last checkpoint, optionally re-entering at a named node, and continues the walk without a fresh operator verdict.

nodes.name: _continue_production_walk
nodes.summary: The continuation walk body shared by resume and recover: iterates remaining manifest nodes, re-running gate side-effects (publishers, UDAC ratification, coverage receipts) and specialist dispatches from the checkpointed index to the terminal gate.

nodes.name: research_detective_gate.py
nodes.summary: R7 research-detective hard-pause gate: when the live flag is on, Irene Pass-2 cannot dispatch until an operator disposition receipt (approve, reject, or defer) is on disk; enforced from the shared dispatch site in both walks.

nodes.name: write_landing_point
nodes.summary: Writes the landing-point marker telling the operator where the research-detective disposition is awaited for a trial.

nodes.name: write_disposition
nodes.summary: Persists the operator's research disposition receipt (approve, reject, or defer) with rationale into the run directory.

nodes.name: load_disposition
nodes.summary: Loads the persisted research disposition receipt from a run directory if present.

nodes.name: enforce_before_pass2
nodes.summary: The gate's teeth: raises ResearchDetectiveGateError blocking Irene Pass-2 dispatch unless a valid non-advisory disposition receipt is on disk.

nodes.name: research_wiring.py
nodes.summary: Runner-wired Irene-to-Tracy-to-Texas research bridge: for in-scope plan units with research-enrichment goals, dispatches retrieval intents to Texas and attaches cited research entries (with source_ref and source_hash) to the production envelope, degrading visibly when credentials are absent.

nodes.name: consensus_creds_present
nodes.summary: Checks whether Consensus retrieval credentials are present in the environment for live research dispatch.

nodes.name: resolve_research_posture
nodes.summary: Resolves the research posture (legacy vs detective) for a research brief, controlling how retrieval intents are phrased.

nodes.name: DeterministicPostureSelector
nodes.summary: Deterministic posture selector that classifies each research goal into a retrieval posture without any LLM call, keeping the research fan-out replayable.

nodes.name: _plan_dict_for_bridge_from_raw
nodes.summary: Normalizes a raw lesson-plan payload into the dict shape the Irene-Tracy-Texas bridge consumes.

nodes.name: _research_goals_from_raw
nodes.summary: Extracts research-enrichment goals from raw lesson-plan units, keyed by in-scope plan unit id.

nodes.name: has_research_goals
nodes.summary: Reports whether the locked lesson plan in the envelope carries any research-enrichment goals worth dispatching.

nodes.name: _dispatch_intents_to_texas
nodes.summary: Dispatches the composed retrieval intents to the Texas retrieval wrangler and collects raw provider results.

nodes.name: run_research_wiring
nodes.summary: Runner-wired node handler: selects postures per research goal, dispatches Texas retrieval, mints cited research entries with provenance, gates citation fidelity, and records the (possibly visibly degraded) contribution in the envelope.

nodes.name: build_retrieval_source_refs_for_entries
nodes.summary: Builds resolvable retrieval source references for a set of cited research entries.

nodes.name: research_entries_from_envelope
nodes.summary: Reads the recorded cited research entries back out of the production envelope for downstream consumers.

nodes.name: routing.py
nodes.summary: Manifest-driven Marcus specialist routing: resolves the next node transition from the pipeline manifest into a typed RoutingDecision.

nodes.name: RoutingDecision
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic value object describing one manifest-resolved step transition (current node, next node, target specialist, optional dispatch envelope).

nodes.name: route_step
nodes.summary: Resolves the next node for the current node from the PipelineManifest edges and returns the RoutingDecision, failing loud on unroutable nodes.

nodes.name: slide_variant_selection.py
nodes.summary: Parses the Storyboard-A chooser selection code the operator pastes as the G2B verdict into a per-slide variant map and fail-louds on any coverage gap so a partial or stale pick can never silently default downstream.

nodes.name: parse_selection_code
nodes.summary: Parses the SBA-<run_tag> chooser code into a slide-id-to-variant mapping using the ordered slide id list.

nodes.name: validate_selections
nodes.summary: Validates that exactly one known variant is chosen for every slide, raising SlideVariantSelectionError on gaps or unknown ids.

nodes.name: specialist_summary_writer.py
nodes.summary: Orchestrator-facing barrel re-exporting the specialist summary API from app.models.state so specialist graphs can emit summaries without importing app.marcus and breaking lane contracts.

nodes.name: styleguide_picker.py
nodes.summary: Pre-run localhost HTML style-picker at creative-directive entry: serves a card-grid page from the CD-owned styleguide SSOT via an ephemeral-port http.server, captures the operator's pick with one POST, and writes it into the run directive plus an append-only pick-events ledger.

nodes.name: _advisory_lock
nodes.summary: Context-managed advisory file lock guarding concurrent writes to the pick-events store.

nodes.name: read_pick_events
nodes.summary: Reads and parses the append-only styleguide pick-events JSONL ledger, skipping malformed rows.

nodes.name: _assert_pickable_guide
nodes.summary: Asserts a guide name exists in the SSOT roster and is not deprecated or otherwise unpickable.

nodes.name: assert_pickable_guide
nodes.summary: Public wrapper validating a guide name against the SSOT file on disk.

nodes.name: load_picker_roster
nodes.summary: Loads the picker roster from the styleguide SSOT, filtering probes and deprecated guides and annotating last-used timestamps from the events ledger.

nodes.name: thumbnail_routes
nodes.summary: Maps roster thumbnail files to the local HTTP routes the picker server exposes.

nodes.name: _resolve_thumbnail
nodes.summary: Resolves a roster entry's thumbnail path against the repo root with existence and dimension checks.

nodes.name: _render_card
nodes.summary: Renders one styleguide roster entry as an HTML card for the local picker page.

nodes.name: render_picker_html
nodes.summary: Renders the full local picker page whose pick form POSTs to the same-origin /pick action on the ephemeral server.

nodes.name: _PickHandler
nodes.summary: http.server request handler serving the picker page and thumbnails via GET and accepting exactly one valid pick POST before the server exits.

nodes.name: _cli_fallback
nodes.summary: Terminal numbered-list fallback for capturing a styleguide pick when no browser flow is available.

nodes.name: capture_pick
nodes.summary: Serves the picker page on an ephemeral localhost port, opens the browser, and blocks until one valid pick POST arrives or the timeout triggers the CLI fallback.

nodes.name: write_pick_to_directive
nodes.summary: Writes the captured pick into the run directive's styleguide binding surface atomically, validating picks against the SSOT and recording provenance.

nodes.name: append_pick_event
nodes.summary: Appends a deduplicated pick event to the append-only JSONL ledger under the advisory lock, keyed by run and course.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point wiring roster loading, pick capture, directive write, and event append into one operator-facing flow.

nodes.name: supervisor.py
nodes.summary: Marcus orchestration supervisor preset routing: maps the production/explore preset onto plan-and-execute vs react mode and steps through the manifest via route_step.

nodes.name: Supervisor
nodes.summary: Thin supervisor that holds the pipeline manifest and preset, exposing mode selection and a run_step that delegates node transitions to route_step.

nodes.name: udac_wiring.py
nodes.summary: UDAC v1 orchestrator wiring: the gate-crossing WRITER that ratifies assets into the run-asset index when an operator clears a gate (fired in both walk bodies), and the walk-invariant READER that resolves consumed assets fail-loud at the shared dispatch site.

nodes.name: udac_active
nodes.summary: Feature-flag check reporting whether UDAC asset-index wiring is active for the current run.

nodes.name: record_gate_ratification
nodes.summary: Gate-crossing writer: idempotently and monotonically ratifies the assets associated with a cleared gate into the run-asset index on disk.

nodes.name: resolve_consumed_assets
nodes.summary: Dispatch-site reader: resolves the assets a specialist declares it consumes from the run-asset index, failing loud when a required ratified asset is missing.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel re-exporting the runtime-owned Pydantic models: AdhocResponse, ProductionEnvelope, SpecialistContribution, ProductionTrialEnvelope, and the trial economics report family.

nodes.name: adhoc_response.py
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic response contract for one-shot Marcus ad-hoc asks, carrying the response text, model used, token usage, and inline cost metadata.

nodes.name: TokenCount
nodes.summary: Strict token-usage model validating that total_tokens covers input plus output tokens.

nodes.name: AdhocResponse
nodes.summary: Ad-hoc LLM response value object with text, model id, TokenCount, and non-negative cost in USD.

nodes.name: production_envelope.py
nodes.summary: Strict cross-specialist accumulator for production composition: SpecialistContribution rows with enforced output digests and the ProductionEnvelope that appends, queries, and prunes contributions across the node walk.

nodes.name: compute_output_digest
nodes.summary: Computes the canonical sha256 digest of a contribution output payload for tamper-evidence.

nodes.name: SpecialistContribution
nodes.summary: One specialist's recorded output in the envelope, with validators enforcing timezone-aware timestamps and a matching output digest.

nodes.name: ProductionEnvelope
nodes.summary: The cross-specialist accumulator: enforces UUID4 trial ids and exposes add_contribution, get_contribution, latest_for_specialist, and node-scoped contribution pruning.

nodes.name: production_trial_envelope.py
nodes.summary: Strict envelope for production-graph trial lifecycle state: trial identity, start/completion timestamps, gate history, and lifecycle invariants over paused, completed, and errored states.

nodes.name: ProductionTrialEnvelope
nodes.summary: Trial lifecycle value object with validators enforcing UUID4 identity, timezone-aware start/completion times, and cross-field lifecycle invariants.

nodes.name: trial_economics_report.py
nodes.summary: Strict per-trial economics report models: per-agent cost entries, drift alerts, budget status, and the TrialEconomicsReport aggregate with cost-posture consistency validators.

nodes.name: TrialEconomicsReport
nodes.summary: Aggregate economics report validating timezone-aware timestamps, non-negative model costs, and that the cost posture matches the count of unavailable-cost runs.

nodes.name: operator_verdict.py
nodes.summary: OperatorVerdict frozen value object for human-in-the-loop gate decisions (FR31/FR34): approve, edit, or reject with tamper-evident digest, UUID, and timezone enforcement.

nodes.name: OperatorVerdict
nodes.summary: Frozen HIL verdict model enforcing UUID4 ids, timezone-aware timestamps, sha256 decision-card digests, and verb/payload cross-field invariants via the standalone validators module.

nodes.name: specialist_summary_artifacts.py
nodes.summary: Specialist summary persistence for adjacent gate context: canonicalizes specialist ids, builds length-validated summary texts, emits them into the run directory, and loads the most recent summary for the next gate's context.

nodes.name: canonical_specialist_id
nodes.summary: Normalizes a specialist id to its canonical form, rejecting ids outside the known roster.

nodes.name: build_summary_text
nodes.summary: Builds the structured, length-validated summary text for a specialist's gate crossing including received keys, decision, and artifact paths.

nodes.name: _artifacts_from_contribution
nodes.summary: Extracts artifact paths and decision context from a specialist's recorded contribution in the state envelope.

nodes.name: emit_summary
nodes.summary: Writes a specialist summary artifact into the trial's run directory keyed by specialist, gate, and timestamp.

nodes.name: emit_summary_for_state
nodes.summary: Convenience emitter deriving the summary inputs directly from a specialist graph state before persisting.

nodes.name: load_most_recent_summary
nodes.summary: Loads the most recent adjacent specialist summary for a trial, optionally bounded by a before-timestamp.

nodes.name: operator_verdict_validators.py
nodes.summary: Standalone cross-field validators for OperatorVerdict: the tamper-verb red-rejection layer and the verb/payload consistency invariant (edit requires edit_payload, reject requires reject_reason).

nodes.name: enforce_no_tamper_verbs
nodes.summary: Second layer of the triple-layer red-rejection: rejects any verdict verb outside approve/edit/reject even on paths that bypass the Literal type.

nodes.name: enforce_verb_payload_consistency
nodes.summary: Enforces that edit verdicts carry an edit_payload, reject verdicts carry a reject_reason, and approve verdicts carry neither.

nodes.name: cascade_config.py
nodes.summary: Operator-editable cascade and pricing configuration loaders for economics: CascadeConfig maps agent aliases to model entries, PricingTable computes per-token costs, and a small CLI validates that pricing covers the cascade.

nodes.name: CascadeConfig
nodes.summary: Cascade configuration model rejecting alias collisions and resolving an agent alias to its cascade entry.

nodes.name: PricingTable
nodes.summary: Per-model pricing table computing USD cost from input and output token counts.

nodes.name: ensure_pricing_covers_cascade
nodes.summary: Asserts every model referenced by the cascade has a pricing entry, failing loud on gaps.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry validating the cascade and pricing config files agree.

nodes.name: economics.py
nodes.summary: Per-trial cost measurement and persistence for the migrated runtime: extracts spend from trace runs, reconciles pass-1 provider attempts, computes per-agent drift against history, renders markdown cost reports, and persists the artifact set atomically under an exclusive lock.

nodes.name: _stable_json_object
nodes.summary: Loads and stably parses a JSON object from disk with defensive handling of malformed content.

nodes.name: _fetch_trial_trace
nodes.summary: Fetches the trial's trace runs from the LangSmith client for cost extraction, bounded by project and limit.

nodes.name: check_trial_budget
nodes.summary: Compares the running trial spend against the budget and returns the BudgetStatus verdict.

nodes.name: compute_per_agent_drift
nodes.summary: Computes per-agent cost drift for a report against historical trial reports, emitting drift alerts past thresholds.

nodes.name: measure_trial_cost
nodes.summary: Core cost measurement: flattens trace runs, attributes model spend per agent via the cascade and pricing table, applies budget and drift checks, and returns the TrialEconomicsReport.

nodes.name: _load_pass1_provider_attempts
nodes.summary: Loads the pass-1 call-journal provider attempts for a trial and prices each attempt for the reconciliation ledger.

nodes.name: _reconcile_pass1_provider_attempts
nodes.summary: Reconciles trace-derived costs against the pass-1 provider attempt ledger, adjusting the report so retried or unjournaled provider spend is not lost.

nodes.name: _render_cost_report_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders the human-readable markdown cost report including per-agent tables, drift alerts, and the provider-attempt ledger.

nodes.name: _exclusive_cost_report_lock
nodes.summary: Context-managed exclusive lock over the run's cost-report directory preventing concurrent artifact writes.

nodes.name: _recover_cost_artifact_transaction
nodes.summary: Recovers a half-written cost-artifact transaction by rolling forward or discarding temporary files.

nodes.name: _persist_cost_artifact_set
nodes.summary: Atomically persists the JSON report, markdown report, and attempt ledger as one fsynced transaction.

nodes.name: record_trial_cost_report
nodes.summary: Public entry persisting a trial's economics report artifact set into the run directory under the exclusive lock.

nodes.name: summarize_cost_reports
nodes.summary: Aggregates persisted cost reports across trials in a runs root into a summary view.

nodes.name: load_trace_fixture
nodes.summary: Loads a recorded trace fixture from disk for offline, deterministic cost-measurement testing.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Gary consumed-payload contract: the frozen set of envelope payload keys Gary's act body may read, lockstep-tested so manifest dependency edges and the S3 package builder share one vocabulary for the lesson-plan to slide-briefs to Gamma chain.

nodes.languageNotes: One-class-per-file convention with a flat re-export surface; roster authority lives in state/config/dispatch-registry.yaml.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Gate package barrel that re-exports the gate error types, party-mode interrupt, resume-registry API, and the guarded OperatorVerdict for a single import surface.

nodes.name: errors.py
nodes.summary: Defines the gate-layer exception hierarchy: base GateError plus guardrail violations for scheduler imports and unauthorized resume bypasses.

nodes.name: GateError
nodes.summary: Base exception for gate-layer failures, carrying a message for operator-facing transport responses.

nodes.name: SchedulerImportError
nodes.summary: Raised when forbidden scheduler modules are imported into the gate layer, enforcing the no-autonomous-scheduling invariant.

nodes.name: UnauthorizedResumeBypassError
nodes.summary: Raised when source code attempts to resume a paused gate without going through the sanctioned verdict path.

nodes.name: guardrails.py
nodes.summary: Static-analysis guardrails that prevent scheduler modules or gate-bypass calls from entering the gate layer, via runtime sys.modules checks and AST scans of source files.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Python's ast module to walk parsed source trees, rejecting forbidden imports and bypass call patterns at review time rather than runtime.

nodes.name: assert_scheduler_modules_not_loaded
nodes.summary: Raises SchedulerImportError if any forbidden scheduler module is already present in sys.modules.

nodes.name: assert_no_scheduler_or_bypass_source
nodes.summary: Parses a source string into an AST and rejects forbidden scheduler imports or unauthorized resume-bypass call sites.

nodes.name: scan_paths
nodes.summary: Runs the AST guardrail scan over a collection of source file paths.

nodes.name: party_mode_as_interrupt.py
nodes.summary: Wraps a BMAD party-mode roundtable as a LangGraph interrupt: builds a DecisionCard from normalized party contributions, registers it, pauses the graph, and resumes from the operator verdict.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses langgraph.types.interrupt to surface the decision card and blocks until an OperatorVerdict payload is supplied on resume.

nodes.name: build_party_mode_decision_card
nodes.summary: Assembles a DecisionCard with metadata and normalized PartyModeContribution entries for a gate/trial pair.

nodes.name: party_mode_as_interrupt
nodes.summary: Registers the party-mode decision card, raises a LangGraph interrupt, and validates/resumes from the returned operator verdict.

nodes.name: finding_record_has_trace_link
nodes.summary: Checks that a party finding record carries a well-formed trace link matching the TRACE_LINK_PATTERN.

nodes.name: poll_surface.py
nodes.summary: Operator poll surface for the Section 04.5 HIL gate: displays the cost/scope estimator (G1 card) for review with a canonical SHA-256 digest, validates the operator verdict against Section04_5OperatorVerdict, and resumes the paused production walk from the verdict.

nodes.name: load_estimator
nodes.summary: Loads and validates a G1 estimator card from a JSON or YAML file.

nodes.name: display_estimator
nodes.summary: Builds the operator-facing review payload with estimator id, canonical digest, and full card dump.

nodes.name: submit_verdict
nodes.summary: Validates an operator verdict payload against Section04_5OperatorVerdict, enforcing estimator-id match and transport rules.

nodes.name: resume_from_verdict
nodes.summary: Cross-checks the verdict against the displayed estimator digest and returns the resume payload for the paused walk.

nodes.name: poll_surface.py
nodes.summary: Operator poll surface for the Section 04.55 HIL gate: displays the run-constants document for review with a canonical SHA-256 digest, validates the operator verdict against Section04_55OperatorVerdict, and resumes the paused production walk from the verdict.

nodes.name: _RunConstantsReviewPayload
nodes.summary: Internal Pydantic payload pairing a non-empty run_constants_id with the constants mapping for review display.

nodes.name: load_run_constants
nodes.summary: Loads the run-constants YAML file and rejects non-mapping payloads with GateError.

nodes.name: display_run_constants
nodes.summary: Builds the operator review payload with extracted constants id and canonical digest.

nodes.name: submit_verdict
nodes.summary: Validates the operator verdict against Section04_55OperatorVerdict with constants-id match enforcement.

nodes.name: poll_surface.py
nodes.summary: Operator poll surface for the Section 04A HIL gate: displays the lesson-plan PlanUnit (G1 decision card) for review with a canonical SHA-256 digest, validates the operator verdict against Section04AOperatorVerdict, and resumes the paused production walk from the verdict.
nodes.languageNotes: Derives deterministic UUID4s from SHA-256 seeds so decision-card identity is stable across replays.

nodes.name: load_plan_unit
nodes.summary: Loads a PlanUnit model from a YAML file via schema validation.

nodes.name: build_g1_card
nodes.summary: Constructs a G1Card decision card from a PlanUnit with a deterministic canonical digest.

nodes.name: display_plan_unit
nodes.summary: Builds the operator review payload combining the G1 decision card dump and the PlanUnit dump.

nodes.name: apply_plan_unit_edit
nodes.summary: Applies a whitelisted-field edit payload to a PlanUnit, rejecting unknown fields and re-validating the result.

nodes.name: submit_verdict
nodes.summary: Validates the operator verdict against Section04AOperatorVerdict with plan-unit-id and transport enforcement.

nodes.name: resume_from_verdict
nodes.summary: Re-derives the (possibly edited) PlanUnit for the verdict, rebuilds the G1 card, verifies digests, and returns the resume payload.

nodes.name: poll_surface.py
nodes.summary: Operator poll surface for the Section 11B HIL gate: displays the Descript input package (G4 card) for review with a canonical SHA-256 digest, validates the operator verdict against Section11BOperatorVerdict, and resumes the paused production walk from the verdict.

nodes.name: load_input_package
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the input-package G4Card from a JSON or YAML file.

nodes.name: display_input_package
nodes.summary: Builds the operator review payload with card digest and input-package summary.

nodes.name: submit_verdict
nodes.summary: Validates the operator verdict against Section11BOperatorVerdict with input-package-id match enforcement.

nodes.name: resume_from_verdict
nodes.summary: Cross-checks the verdict against the displayed card digest and returns the input-package resume payload.

nodes.name: poll_surface.py
nodes.summary: Operator poll surface for the Section 15 HIL gate: displays the final handoff bundle (G5 card) for review with a canonical SHA-256 digest, validates the operator verdict against Section15OperatorVerdict, and resumes the paused production walk from the verdict.

nodes.name: load_final_handoff
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the final-handoff G5Card from a JSON or YAML file.

nodes.name: display_final_handoff
nodes.summary: Builds the operator review payload with card digest and final-handoff summary.

nodes.name: submit_verdict
nodes.summary: Validates the operator verdict against Section15OperatorVerdict with handoff-id match enforcement.

nodes.name: resume_from_verdict
nodes.summary: Cross-checks the verdict against the displayed card digest and returns the final-handoff resume payload.

nodes.name: verdict.py
nodes.summary: Gate-layer re-export of OperatorVerdict/OperatorVerdictVerb that runs the scheduler-import guardrail at import time before exposing the verdict models.
