nodes.languageNotes: Import order is load-bearing: assert_scheduler_modules_not_loaded() executes before the verdict model import to enforce the no-scheduler invariant.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: HTTP package barrel exposing the gate endpoint module.

nodes.name: gate_endpoint.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI HTTP bridge for the gate verdict and override flow: endpoints validate operator payloads, resume paused runs from verdicts, and drive the two-phase override submit/apply protocol.

nodes.name: gate_verdict_endpoint
nodes.summary: Validates an OperatorVerdict from the HTTP payload, resumes the paused run, and returns the transport response.

nodes.name: gate_override_submit_endpoint
nodes.summary: Submits an override request for a trial/node and returns the cache-impact warning for operator confirmation.

nodes.name: gate_override_apply_endpoint
nodes.summary: Applies a confirmed override using the confirm token, translating stale-token errors into HTTP failures.

nodes.name: create_gate_app
nodes.summary: Builds the FastAPI application wiring the verdict and override endpoints with header-based operator identification and error mapping.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Learning-ledger package barrel re-exporting event models, builders, the emitter, and analytic queries as a single import surface.

nodes.name: emitter.py
nodes.summary: Idempotent Postgres emitter for learning-ledger events: ensures the ledger schema, deduplicates by idempotency key, and tracks emission-failure counters.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses psycopg with an idempotency-key lookup so re-emitting the same event returns the existing event id instead of double-writing.

nodes.name: EmissionResult
nodes.summary: Result model reporting the persisted event id and whether the emission was deduplicated.

nodes.name: ensure_ledger_schema
nodes.summary: Applies the ledger SQL schema to the given connection.

nodes.name: emit_ledger_event
nodes.summary: Persists a ledger event with idempotency-key dedupe, failure counting, and optional caller-supplied connection or database URL.

nodes.name: events.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic models and builders for the three learning-ledger event families (verdict, override, sanctum mutation), each with UUID4/timezone enforcement, natural keys, and deterministic idempotency keys.
nodes.languageNotes: Each event derives its idempotency key from a natural key, so the same logical event always maps to the same ledger row.

nodes.name: _LedgerEventBase
nodes.summary: Base event model enforcing UUID4 ids and tz-aware timestamps, and deriving payload plus idempotency key from a natural key.

nodes.name: VerdictLedgerEvent
nodes.summary: Ledger event recording an operator gate verdict with related card/verdict UUID validation.

nodes.name: OverrideLedgerEvent
nodes.summary: Ledger event recording a component override (submit/apply phase) on a trial node.

nodes.name: SanctumMutationLedgerEvent
nodes.summary: Ledger event recording a sanctum file mutation with before/after hashes and mutation timestamp.

nodes.name: build_verdict_ledger_event
nodes.summary: Builds a VerdictLedgerEvent from an OperatorVerdict and transport kind.

nodes.name: build_override_ledger_event
nodes.summary: Builds an OverrideLedgerEvent capturing previous/new model and confirm token for an override phase.

nodes.name: build_sanctum_mutation_ledger_event
nodes.summary: Builds a SanctumMutationLedgerEvent from file path, hash pair, and mutation time.

nodes.name: queries.py
nodes.summary: Read-side analytics over the learning ledger: per-gate reject rates, gate inventory, and sanctum-mutation history for a trial, each accepting an injected connection or database URL.

nodes.name: reject_rate_per_gate
nodes.summary: Computes accept/reject counts and reject rate per gate for a trial from verdict ledger events.

nodes.name: gate_inventory
nodes.summary: Lists the gates seen for a trial with event counts and latest activity.

nodes.name: sanctum_mutations
nodes.summary: Returns the sanctum-mutation ledger rows recorded for a trial.

nodes.name: m3_trial.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic local M3 trial harness that replays a frozen four-gate walk (G1/G2C/G3/G4) with pinned UUIDs and timestamps, exercising decision-card registration, verdict resume, and the override submit/apply flow without live services.
nodes.languageNotes: Intentionally frozen baseline: it walks only the four originally-surfaced gates and diverges from the live production runner (which also pauses at G2B/G4A) by design.

nodes.name: TrialGateEvent
nodes.summary: Record of a single gate pause/resume cycle within the M3 trial envelope.

nodes.name: TrialEnvelope
nodes.summary: Top-level envelope aggregating the M3 trial's gate events, verdicts, and override ledger for close artifacts.

nodes.name: _stable_state
nodes.summary: Builds a deterministic RunState with pinned UUIDs, sanctum fingerprint, and base time for the trial.

nodes.name: _card_for_gate
nodes.summary: Constructs the pinned decision card (G1/G2C/G3/G4) for a gate with deterministic metadata and digest.

nodes.name: _verdict_for_gate
nodes.summary: Builds the deterministic accept OperatorVerdict matching a gate's card id and digest.

nodes.name: run_local_m3_trial
nodes.summary: Runs the full deterministic M3 walk: registers cards, pauses/resumes each supported gate, exercises the override flow, and returns the TrialEnvelope.

nodes.name: per_slide_subgraph.py
nodes.summary: Per-slide LangGraph subgraph helpers: fans a gate out across slides via Send, runs per-slide review with interrupts, joins results, and enforces the max-3-revise oscillation invariant with escape cards.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses langgraph.types.Send for map-style fan-out and interrupt for per-slide operator review; a fourth revise raises OscillationEscapeRequiredError carrying an EscapeCard.

nodes.name: EscapeCard
nodes.summary: Frozen decision-card payload surfaced when a slide exceeds the revise limit, listing escape options and rationale floor.

nodes.name: OscillationEscapeRequiredError
nodes.summary: Raised when a fourth revise would violate the max-3 oscillation invariant; carries the escape card.

nodes.name: fan_out_per_slide
nodes.summary: Builds LangGraph Send commands to dispatch one subgraph invocation per slide for a gate.

nodes.name: per_slide_review_subgraph
nodes.summary: Runs the per-slide review node: surfaces the slide via interrupt and interprets the operator's approve/revise response.

nodes.name: join_per_slide_results
nodes.summary: Joins fan-out results, asserting the expected slide count before aggregation.

nodes.name: apply_escape_card
nodes.summary: Validates an operator's escape-card option and rationale against the floor and returns the resolved escape action.

nodes.name: section_09_lock.py
nodes.summary: Section 09 four-artifact lock: validates that the gary-slide-content, kira-motion-plan, vera-fidelity-verdict, and quinn-r-qa-verdict artifacts all exist, parse, and match the plan-unit id before the walk may proceed, appending tripwire records on any failure.
nodes.languageNotes: Failures are appended to a JSONL tripwire log with digests before GateError is raised, making every lock trip auditable.

nodes.name: Section09LockArtifactPaths
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of the four required artifact paths with blank-path rejection.

nodes.name: Section09LockArtifactRef
nodes.summary: Validated reference to a single lock artifact carrying kind, path, digest, and plan-unit id.

nodes.name: Section09LockResult
nodes.summary: Result model for a lock evaluation with tz-aware timestamp and per-artifact references.

nodes.name: _load_json_artifact
nodes.summary: Loads one lock artifact, classifying absence, parse errors, plan-unit mismatches, and validation errors into tripwire failures.

nodes.name: enforce_section_09_lock
nodes.summary: Validates all four Section 09 artifacts against the plan-unit id and returns the lock result, tripping the tripwire log on failure.

nodes.name: diagram_cards.py
nodes.summary: Gary diagram-cards pre-dispatch writer: Pydantic models for per-slide visual/diagram specifications plus a JSON emitter that persists the validated payload for downstream dispatch.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses strict Pydantic v2 field validators that reject blank strings on every required field.

nodes.name: DiagramCard
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a single slide diagram specification (slide index, visual kind, specification text, optional caption) with blank-string rejection validators.

nodes.name: GaryDiagramCards
nodes.summary: Versioned envelope model grouping DiagramCard entries under a plan unit and target section for Gary's pre-dispatch package.

nodes.name: emit_gary_diagram_cards
nodes.summary: Serializes a validated GaryDiagramCards payload to a JSON artifact on disk, creating parent directories as needed.

nodes.name: fidelity_slides.py
nodes.summary: Gary fidelity-slides pre-dispatch writer: models Vera-sourced fidelity criteria per plan unit and emits the validated payload as a JSON artifact for dispatch.

nodes.name: VeraFidelityCriterion
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for one Vera fidelity criterion (id, severity, description, optional source reference) with strict blank-string rejection.

nodes.name: GaryFidelitySlides
nodes.summary: Versioned envelope grouping Vera fidelity criteria under a plan unit and target section for Gary's pre-dispatch package.

nodes.name: emit_gary_fidelity_slides
nodes.summary: Serializes a validated GaryFidelitySlides payload to a JSON artifact on disk, creating parent directories as needed.

nodes.name: outbound_envelope.py
nodes.summary: Gary outbound-envelope writer and pre-dispatch markdown aggregator: models the envelope of writer entries dispatched to Gary, persists it as YAML, and renders a combined pre-dispatch markdown package.
nodes.languageNotes: Enforces timezone-aware datetimes via enforce_tz_aware from the shared state base, matching the project's Pydantic v2 schema checklist.

nodes.name: OutboundEnvelopeEntry
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for one dispatched writer entry (writer id, target section, payload reference, tz-aware dispatch timestamp, operator id).

nodes.name: GaryOutboundEnvelope
nodes.summary: Versioned outbound envelope aggregating dispatched writer entries for a plan unit, with tz-aware timestamp and blank-string enforcement.

nodes.name: emit_gary_outbound_envelope
nodes.summary: Persists a validated GaryOutboundEnvelope as a YAML artifact on disk, creating parent directories as needed.

nodes.name: pre_dispatch_package_gary_md
nodes.summary: Renders the full pre-dispatch package as a single markdown document by iterating envelope entries in sorted order and inlining each entry's payload via pluggable loaders.

nodes.name: section_15_bundle.py
nodes.summary: Section 15 final operator handoff bundle writer: loads and validates the Gary outbound envelope, renders the Descript assembly guide, and emits the digest-pinned Section15Bundle with slab-close evidence.
nodes.languageNotes: Pins the assembly guide with a SHA-256 digest and raises GateError on missing prerequisites, keeping the handoff bundle fail-loud.

nodes.name: Section15Bundle
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of the final handoff bundle record: assembly bundle path, guide digest, trial-3 transcript anchor, and slab-close evidence path with blank-path rejection.

nodes.name: load_outbound_envelope
nodes.summary: Loads a GaryOutboundEnvelope from disk, dispatching between JSON and YAML parsing based on the file suffix.

nodes.name: render_descript_assembly_guide
nodes.summary: Renders the Descript assembly guide markdown from the outbound envelope, inlining each entry's payload text resolved against a base path.

nodes.name: emit_section_15_bundle
nodes.summary: Validates the G5 verdict and prerequisites, writes the assembly guide and slab-close evidence JSON, computes SHA-256 digests, and returns the resulting Section15Bundle.

nodes.name: slide_content.py
nodes.summary: Gary slide-content pre-dispatch writer: models per-slide title/body content entries and emits the validated payload as a JSON artifact for dispatch.

nodes.name: SlideContentEntry
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for one slide's content (index, title, body, content kind) with blank-string rejection validators.

nodes.name: GarySlideContent
nodes.summary: Versioned envelope grouping slide content entries under a plan unit and target section for Gary's pre-dispatch package.

nodes.name: emit_gary_slide_content
nodes.summary: Serializes a validated GarySlideContent payload to a JSON artifact on disk, creating parent directories as needed.

nodes.name: theme_resolution.py
nodes.summary: Gary theme-resolution pre-dispatch writer: models the resolved presentation theme (name, palette, template intent) bound to an experience profile and emits it as a JSON artifact.

nodes.name: ResolvedTheme
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of a resolved theme (theme name, palette, template intent) with blank-string rejection on name and intent.

nodes.name: GaryThemeResolution
nodes.summary: Versioned envelope binding a ResolvedTheme to a plan unit, experience profile id, and optional creative directive id for Gary's pre-dispatch package.

nodes.name: emit_gary_theme_resolution
nodes.summary: Serializes a validated GaryThemeResolution payload to a JSON artifact on disk, creating parent directories as needed.

nodes.name: gate_decide.py
nodes.summary: MCP server tool handlers for gate verdicts and overrides: validates operator verdict payloads and delegates to the gate resume API and runtime override API, returning transport-shaped responses.

nodes.name: gate_decide_tool
nodes.summary: MCP tool that validates an OperatorVerdict payload, resumes the paused run via resume_from_verdict, and returns the transport response.

nodes.name: override_submit_tool
nodes.summary: MCP tool that submits a proposed override for a trial via submit_override and returns cache-impact and sanctum warnings for operator confirmation.

nodes.name: override_apply_tool
nodes.summary: MCP tool that applies a confirmed override via apply_override, handling stale-token errors and returning the override event plus refreshed decision-card meta.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel for the DecisionCard model family used by Marcus HIL gates: re-exports every per-gate card class, the shared base/meta models, override events, and the vocabulary tokens, and defines the discriminated card union.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a pydantic TypeAdapter over an Annotated discriminated union of all gate card types.

nodes.name: __main__.py
nodes.summary: CLI entry point that runs the decision-card vocabulary utilities (schema emission) via python -m app.models.decision_cards.

nodes.name: _base.py
nodes.summary: Shared DecisionCard base classes for the Slab 7c gate families: the CacheState enum, DecisionCardMeta with strict cache-state and affected-nodes validation, and the digest-carrying DecisionCardBase.

nodes.name: DecisionCardMeta
nodes.summary: Slab 7c meta block for decision cards: cache state, non-empty affected nodes, and the override trail, with strict validators rejecting unknown states and empty node lists.

nodes.name: DecisionCardBase
nodes.summary: Base class for Slab 7c gate cards carrying a SHA-256 hex decision_card_digest (regex-enforced) and the shared meta block.

nodes.name: base.py
nodes.summary: Base DecisionCard models shared by Marcus gate families: the richer DecisionCardMeta (reject rate, party-mode contributions, sanctum warnings) and the generic DecisionCard with UUID4 and tz-aware enforcement.
nodes.languageNotes: Coexists with _base.py: this variant carries party-mode contributions and sanctum warnings, while _base.py is the leaner Slab 7c digest-bearing base.

nodes.name: DecisionCardMeta
nodes.summary: Rich decision-card meta block: cache state, affected nodes, override trail, reject rate, party-mode contributions, tz-aware consolidation timestamp, and sanctum warnings.

nodes.name: DecisionCard
nodes.summary: Generic gate decision card (card/trial/gate ids, drafted proposal, evidence, risks, verb, meta) with UUID4 and timezone-aware datetime enforcement.

nodes.name: g0.py
nodes.summary: Gate G0 DecisionCard model: corpus-path confirmation card requiring at least one confirmed corpus path and a non-blank confirmation summary, with POSIX path serialization.

nodes.name: G0Card
nodes.summary: G0 gate card capturing confirmed corpus paths, directive run id, and confirmation summary, with UUID4/tz enforcement and non-empty-path validation.

nodes.name: g0e.py
nodes.summary: Gate G0E DecisionCard model — operator confirm-gate #1: presents typed components, provisional learning objectives, traversal roots, enumeration provenance, and a coverage plan for operator confirmation.

nodes.name: G0ECard
nodes.summary: G0E confirm-gate card with typed components, provisional LOs, traversal roots, reconcile/dissent records, coverage plan, and a required non-blank operator prompt.

nodes.name: g0r.py
nodes.summary: Gate G0R DecisionCard model — operator ratify-gate #2: presents refined learning objectives, the LO delta, reconcile records, and operator-flagged items for ratification.

nodes.name: G0RCard
nodes.summary: G0R ratify-gate card carrying refined LOs, lo_delta, reconcile data, flagged-for-operator items, and a required non-blank operator prompt.

nodes.name: g1.py
nodes.summary: Gate G1 DecisionCard model: trial-open card carrying the drafted proposal, evidence, trial summary, opener identity, and next nodes to walk.

nodes.name: G1Card
nodes.summary: G1 gate card with drafted proposal, evidence, non-blank trial summary and opened_by, next_nodes list, and UUID4/tz-aware enforcement.

nodes.name: g2a.py
nodes.summary: Gate G2A DecisionCard model: plan-unit ratification card requiring a non-blank plan-unit summary, non-empty ratification evidence, and UUID4-valid prior unit ids.

nodes.name: G2ACard
nodes.summary: G2A ratification card binding a plan unit id, summary, ratification evidence, and UUID4-enforced prior unit ids to the trial.

nodes.name: g2b.py
nodes.summary: Gate G2B DecisionCard model — the woken variant-pick HIL gate: presents variant candidates, the selected variant, gamma settings, and pick context for operator style-and-variant selection.

nodes.name: G2BCard
nodes.summary: G2B variant-pick card with variant candidates, selected_variant_id, gamma_settings, pick context, and a required non-blank operator prompt.

nodes.name: g2c.py
nodes.summary: Gate G2C DecisionCard model: readiness-check card reporting readiness status, blocking issues, and the nodes ready to proceed.

nodes.name: G2CCard
nodes.summary: G2C readiness card carrying readiness_status, blocking_issues, and ready_nodes with UUID4/tz-aware enforcement.

nodes.name: g3.py
nodes.summary: Gate G3 DecisionCard model: mid-walk progress card reporting progress percent, the active node, pending nodes, and an operator prompt.

nodes.name: G3Card
nodes.summary: G3 progress card with progress_percent, non-blank active_node_id, pending_nodes, and a required non-blank operator prompt.

nodes.name: g4.py
nodes.summary: Gate G4 DecisionCard model: run-outcome card reporting final status, produced artifact paths, and a non-blank outcome summary.

nodes.name: G4Card
nodes.summary: G4 outcome card with final_status, artifact_paths, and required non-blank outcome_summary plus UUID4/tz-aware enforcement.

nodes.name: g4a.py
nodes.summary: Gate G4A DecisionCard model — the woken voice-pick HIL gate: presents voice candidates, the selected voice, and pick context for operator narration-voice selection.

nodes.name: G4ACard
nodes.summary: G4A voice-pick card with voice_candidates, selected_voice_id, pick context, and a required non-blank operator prompt.

nodes.name: g5.py
nodes.summary: Gate G5 DecisionCard model: final-handoff card binding the bundle run id, non-empty handoff artifact paths (POSIX-serialized), and a non-blank handoff summary.

nodes.name: G5Card
nodes.summary: G5 handoff card with bundle_run_id, non-empty handoff_artifact_paths serialized as POSIX strings, and required handoff_summary.

nodes.name: g6.py
nodes.summary: Gate G6 DecisionCard model: slab-close card validating a patterned slab id, closing run id, retrospective path, non-empty closing artifact paths, and a slab-close summary.

nodes.name: G6Card
nodes.summary: G6 slab-close card with regex-validated slab_id, closing_run_id, retrospective_path, non-empty closing_artifact_paths (POSIX-serialized), and required slab_close_summary.

nodes.name: g_settings.py
nodes.summary: Gate G_SETTINGS DecisionCard model — the pre-walk settings confirm-or-change gate (Story 42.5): presents run settings and the allowed verbs for operator confirmation before the production walk begins.

nodes.name: GSettingsCard
nodes.summary: G_SETTINGS card with run_settings payload, non-empty allowed_verbs, and a required non-blank operator prompt plus UUID4/tz-aware enforcement.

nodes.name: override_event.py
nodes.summary: Override-trail entry model referenced by DecisionCard meta: records who changed which node's value, when, and under which confirm token.

nodes.name: OverrideEvent
nodes.summary: Audit record of one applied override (event id, tz-aware applied_at, node id, previous/new values, operator id, confirm token) with UUID4 enforcement.

nodes.name: vocabulary.py
nodes.summary: Vocabulary-backed decision-card tokens (Slab 7a Story 7a.6): loads the conversational-gates vocabulary YAML registry at module load, builds closed StrEnum classes for gate-card emitters, and provides a CLI to emit the VocabularyDecisionCard JSON Schema.
nodes.languageNotes: Dynamically constructs StrEnum classes from the YAML registry at import time, giving triple-layer red-rejection on closed vocabularies.

nodes.name: VocabularyDecisionCard
nodes.summary: Decision-card model whose decision, directive, and rationale fields are constrained to the closed vocabulary enums loaded from the registry.

nodes.name: decision_card_schema_text
nodes.summary: Returns the VocabularyDecisionCard JSON Schema as deterministic, pretty-printed JSON text.

nodes.name: emit_decision_card_schema
nodes.summary: Writes the vocabulary decision-card JSON Schema to a target path, creating parent directories as needed; invoked by the module CLI.

nodes.name: party_mode_contribution.py
nodes.summary: Strict party-mode contribution contract: models one persona's gate contribution with UUID4 id, non-blank persona, tz-aware submission time, and a regex-validated trace link.

nodes.name: PartyModeContribution
nodes.summary: Contribution record (contribution id, persona, payload, submitted_at, trace_link) with UUID4, tz-aware, and trace-link-pattern enforcement.

nodes.name: operator_verdict_section_04_5.py
nodes.summary: Section 04.5 HIL run-budget estimator verdict models: the operator verdict bound to a decision-card digest with verb/payload consistency rules, plus the estimator edit payload.
nodes.languageNotes: A model_validator enforces cross-field consistency: edit_payload only with edit verbs, reject_reason only with reject.

nodes.name: EstimatorEditPayload
nodes.summary: Edit payload carrying estimator field updates, rejecting blank update keys.

nodes.name: Section04_5OperatorVerdict
nodes.summary: Operator verdict for the Section 04.5 budget-estimator gate: run/surface/estimator ids, verb, tz-aware submission time, SHA-256 decision-card digest, and verb-vs-payload consistency enforcement.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel for the Mira specialist dispatch models, re-exporting MiraDispatchError, MiraDispatchInput, and MiraDispatchReceipt as the public surface.
nodes.languageNotes: One of seven identically-shaped specialist dispatch packages (mira, quinn_r, tamara, tracy, vera, vyx, wanda), each following the error/input/receipt Pydantic-envelope scaffold.

nodes.name: error.py
nodes.summary: Defines MiraDispatchError, the strict Pydantic error envelope (code + message) returned when a Mira prompt-set production dispatch fails.

nodes.name: MiraDispatchError
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 model (extra='forbid', validate_assignment=True) carrying the machine-readable code and human-readable message for a failed Mira dispatch.

nodes.name: input.py
nodes.summary: Defines MiraDispatchInput, the strict Pydantic input contract carrying course/module scope and target workflow for a prompt-set production run dispatched to the Mira specialist.

nodes.name: MiraDispatchInput
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 input model for Mira dispatch with fields course, module, scope, target_workflow, payload_in; extra='forbid' rejects unknown keys and payload_in carries the free-form payload dict.

nodes.name: receipt.py
nodes.summary: Defines MiraDispatchReceipt, the strict Pydantic receipt returned by a successful Mira dispatch, carrying the produced prompt set in the mira_prompt_set field.

nodes.name: MiraDispatchReceipt
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 receipt model whose single optional mira_prompt_set dict holds the produced prompt set from a Mira prompt-set production run.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel for the Quinn-R specialist dispatch models, re-exporting QuinnRDispatchError, QuinnRDispatchInput, and QuinnRDispatchReceipt as the public surface.

nodes.name: error.py
nodes.summary: Defines QuinnRDispatchError, the strict Pydantic error envelope (code + message) returned when a Quinn-R gate-phase review dispatch fails.

nodes.name: QuinnRDispatchError
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 model (extra='forbid', validate_assignment=True) carrying the machine-readable code and human-readable message for a failed Quinn-R dispatch.

nodes.name: input.py
nodes.summary: Defines QuinnRDispatchInput, the strict Pydantic input contract carrying gate phase and artifact paths for a review pass dispatched to the Quinn-R specialist.

nodes.name: QuinnRDispatchInput
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 input model for Quinn-R dispatch with fields gate_phase, artifact_paths, payload_in; extra='forbid' rejects unknown keys and payload_in carries the free-form payload dict.

nodes.name: receipt.py
nodes.summary: Defines QuinnRDispatchReceipt, the strict Pydantic receipt returned by a successful Quinn-R dispatch, carrying the review verdict in the quinn_r_review field.

nodes.name: QuinnRDispatchReceipt
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 receipt model whose single optional quinn_r_review dict holds the review verdict from a Quinn-R gate-phase review run.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel for the Tamara specialist dispatch models, re-exporting TamaraDispatchError, TamaraDispatchInput, and TamaraDispatchReceipt as the public surface.

nodes.name: error.py
nodes.summary: Defines TamaraDispatchError, the strict Pydantic error envelope (code + message) returned when a Tamara design-spec production dispatch fails.

nodes.name: TamaraDispatchError
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 model (extra='forbid', validate_assignment=True) carrying the machine-readable code and human-readable message for a failed Tamara dispatch.

nodes.name: input.py
nodes.summary: Defines TamaraDispatchInput, the strict Pydantic input contract carrying course/module scope and target workflow for a design-spec run dispatched to the Tamara specialist.

nodes.name: TamaraDispatchInput
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 input model for Tamara dispatch with fields course, module, scope, target_workflow, payload_in; extra='forbid' rejects unknown keys and payload_in carries the free-form payload dict.

nodes.name: receipt.py
nodes.summary: Defines TamaraDispatchReceipt, the strict Pydantic receipt returned by a successful Tamara dispatch, carrying the produced design spec in the tamara_design_spec field.

nodes.name: TamaraDispatchReceipt
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 receipt model whose single optional tamara_design_spec dict holds the produced design spec from a Tamara design-spec production run.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel for the Tracy specialist dispatch models, re-exporting TracyDispatchError, TracyDispatchInput, and TracyDispatchReceipt as the public surface.

nodes.name: error.py
nodes.summary: Defines TracyDispatchError, the strict Pydantic error envelope (code + message) returned when a Tracy manifest production from a brief dispatch fails.

nodes.name: TracyDispatchError
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 model (extra='forbid', validate_assignment=True) carrying the machine-readable code and human-readable message for a failed Tracy dispatch.

nodes.name: input.py
nodes.summary: Defines TracyDispatchInput, the strict Pydantic input contract carrying a work brief for a manifest-production run dispatched to the Tracy specialist.

nodes.name: TracyDispatchInput
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 input model for Tracy dispatch with fields brief, payload_in; extra='forbid' rejects unknown keys and payload_in carries the free-form payload dict.

nodes.name: receipt.py
nodes.summary: Defines TracyDispatchReceipt, the strict Pydantic receipt returned by a successful Tracy dispatch, carrying the produced manifest in the tracy_manifest field.

nodes.name: TracyDispatchReceipt
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 receipt model whose single optional tracy_manifest dict holds the produced manifest from a Tracy manifest production from a brief run.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel for the Vera specialist dispatch models, re-exporting VeraDispatchError, VeraDispatchInput, and VeraDispatchReceipt as the public surface.

nodes.name: error.py
nodes.summary: Defines VeraDispatchError, the strict Pydantic error envelope (code + message) returned when a Vera artifact verification against a source of truth dispatch fails.

nodes.name: VeraDispatchError
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 model (extra='forbid', validate_assignment=True) carrying the machine-readable code and human-readable message for a failed Vera dispatch.

nodes.name: input.py
nodes.summary: Defines VeraDispatchInput, the strict Pydantic input contract carrying artifact and source-of-truth paths for a verification pass dispatched to the Vera specialist.

nodes.name: VeraDispatchInput
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 input model for Vera dispatch with fields artifact_path, source_of_truth_path, payload_in; extra='forbid' rejects unknown keys and payload_in carries the free-form payload dict.

nodes.name: receipt.py
nodes.summary: Defines VeraDispatchReceipt, the strict Pydantic receipt returned by a successful Vera dispatch, carrying the verification finding in the vera_finding field.

nodes.name: VeraDispatchReceipt
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 receipt model whose single optional vera_finding dict holds the verification finding from a Vera artifact verification against a source of truth run.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel for the Vyx specialist dispatch models, re-exporting VyxDispatchError, VyxDispatchInput, and VyxDispatchReceipt as the public surface.

nodes.name: error.py
nodes.summary: Defines VyxDispatchError, the strict Pydantic error envelope (code + message) returned when a Vyx storyboard production dispatch fails.

nodes.name: VyxDispatchError
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 model (extra='forbid', validate_assignment=True) carrying the machine-readable code and human-readable message for a failed Vyx dispatch.

nodes.name: input.py
nodes.summary: Defines VyxDispatchInput, the strict Pydantic input contract carrying course/module scope and target workflow for a storyboard run dispatched to the Vyx specialist.

nodes.name: VyxDispatchInput
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 input model for Vyx dispatch with fields course, module, scope, target_workflow, payload_in; extra='forbid' rejects unknown keys and payload_in carries the free-form payload dict.

nodes.name: receipt.py
nodes.summary: Defines VyxDispatchReceipt, the strict Pydantic receipt returned by a successful Vyx dispatch, carrying the produced storyboard in the vyx_storyboard field.

nodes.name: VyxDispatchReceipt
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 receipt model whose single optional vyx_storyboard dict holds the produced storyboard from a Vyx storyboard production run.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel for the Wanda specialist dispatch models, re-exporting WandaDispatchError, WandaDispatchInput, and WandaDispatchReceipt as the public surface.

nodes.name: error.py
nodes.summary: Defines WandaDispatchError, the strict Pydantic error envelope (code + message) returned when a Wanda audio/voice-over synthesis dispatch fails.

nodes.name: WandaDispatchError
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 model (extra='forbid', validate_assignment=True) carrying the machine-readable code and human-readable message for a failed Wanda dispatch.

nodes.name: input.py
nodes.summary: Defines WandaDispatchInput, the strict Pydantic input contract carrying script, capability, and voice id for an audio-synthesis run dispatched to the Wanda specialist.

nodes.name: WandaDispatchInput
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 input model for Wanda dispatch with fields script, capability, voice_id, payload_in; extra='forbid' rejects unknown keys and payload_in carries the free-form payload dict.

nodes.name: receipt.py
nodes.summary: Defines WandaDispatchReceipt, the strict Pydantic receipt returned by a successful Wanda dispatch, carrying the produced audio artifact in the wanda_audio field.

nodes.name: WandaDispatchReceipt
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic v2 receipt model whose single optional wanda_audio dict holds the produced audio artifact from a Wanda audio/voice-over synthesis run.

nodes.name: resume_api.py
nodes.summary: Gate verdict resume substrate: registers issued decision cards with SHA-256 digests and one-time server nonces, then converts operator verdicts into LangGraph resume Commands with tamper and replay protection.
nodes.languageNotes: Enforces scheduler-module lockout at import time via assert_scheduler_modules_not_loaded() so no scheduler can bypass the human gate.

nodes.name: compute_decision_card_digest
nodes.summary: Computes a deterministic SHA-256 digest over the canonical-JSON tuple of decision card, trial id, issuance timestamp, and server nonce.

nodes.name: register_decision_card
nodes.summary: Registers a decision card in the in-process card store, stamping issuance time, a fresh server nonce, and the binding digest.

nodes.name: _resume_payload
nodes.summary: Builds the resume payload dictionary from an OperatorVerdict for injection into the LangGraph resume Command.

nodes.name: build_transport_response
nodes.summary: Builds the transport-facing response for a gate verdict command, emitting a verdict ledger event and echoing card metadata for the given transport kind.

nodes.name: resume_from_verdict
nodes.summary: Validates an operator verdict against the registered card (digest match, nonce not consumed) and returns the LangGraph Command that resumes the paused trial.

nodes.name: storyboard_publisher.py
nodes.summary: Automatic ONLINE storyboard publication at storyboard review gates: before the decision card is issued it invokes the proven legacy generate-storyboard script (generate + publish) against the envelope's Gary contribution, writing a publish receipt. Publish failures raise StoryboardPublishError, error-pausing the trial for recovery.
nodes.languageNotes: Loads the legacy generator script dynamically via importlib.util.spec_from_file_location rather than a package import.

nodes.name: _publisher_config
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the storyboard publisher YAML config, failing loud with StoryboardPublishError when missing or malformed.

nodes.name: _load_generator_module
nodes.summary: Dynamically imports the legacy generate-storyboard.py script as a module via importlib so its generate and publish commands can be invoked in-process.

nodes.name: enrich_segments_for_export
nodes.summary: Enriches narration segments with delta metadata (slide ids, cluster arcs, duplicate-id accounting) prior to segment-manifest export for Storyboard B.

nodes.name: _write_segment_manifest_for_b
nodes.summary: Joins Irene narration segments (guarding against phantom and collapsed segment ids), enriches them, and writes the Storyboard B segment manifest YAML into the run directory.

nodes.name: _cluster_arc_by_id
nodes.summary: Extracts a cluster-id to arc mapping from the production envelope's lesson-plan contribution for segment enrichment.

nodes.name: publish_storyboard_for_gate
nodes.summary: Main entry: for a storyboard gate, materializes the Gary payload, writes the segment manifest, runs the legacy generator's generate and publish commands, verifies the publish receipt, and records the published URL for the gate pause.

nodes.name: adapter.py
nodes.summary: Thin ChatOpenAI factory: resolves the model via the three-level cascade selector and returns a ChatModelHandle pairing the chat model with its ModelResolutionEntry, tagging LangSmith spans with resolution metadata. Deliberately avoids higher-level LangChain abstractions.
nodes.languageNotes: Explicit-return pattern: the caller appends the resolution entry to RunState.model_resolution_trail; no global or context-var state.

nodes.name: _resolution_metadata
nodes.summary: Builds the LangSmith span metadata dict (model id, cascade level, requested/resolved, reason, cache prefix hash) from a resolution entry.

nodes.name: make_chat_model
nodes.summary: Resolves the model for a specialist through the cascade selector and constructs a ChatOpenAI instance with resolution metadata, returning it with the audit-trail entry as a ChatModelHandle.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel re-exporting the perception artifact contract types (PerceptionArtifact plus its coverage, confidence, reading-path, and image-role literals) for downstream QA gates.

nodes.name: perception_artifact.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic contract for per-slide vision perception artifacts — coverage state, confidence, extracted text, reading path with source and degradation flags, macro layout, and image roles — consumed by the Quinn-R fidelity gate and Irene narration grounding.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses closed Literal enums for coverage, provenance, and reading-path vocabulary so unexpected values fail validation.

nodes.name: PerceptionArtifact
nodes.summary: Pydantic model capturing what the vision provider perceived on one slide: visual elements, extracted text, layout, reading path, image roles, and provenance, with a non-blank slide id validator.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: State model package barrel re-exporting the Pydantic v2 state models (RunState, StoryState, CacheState, ModelResolutionEntry, NodeCheckpoint, OperatorVerdict, SanctumFingerprint, SpecialistEnvelope, SpecialistReturn) that encode the LangGraph state contract and reproducibility invariants NFR-X1 through X5.

nodes.name: cache_state.py
nodes.summary: CacheState Pydantic model tracking the sanctum cold-read cache prefix, entry count, and last invalidation timestamp per the cache-prefix-stability architecture decision.

nodes.name: CacheState
nodes.summary: Cache prefix and invalidation tracking model for sanctum and model-resolution caches, with timezone-aware timestamp enforcement.

nodes.name: model_resolution_entry.py
nodes.summary: ModelResolutionEntry Pydantic model recording one level of the three-level model-resolution cascade (per_call, per_specialist, registry_default, auto_select_fallback), including the deterministic cache_prefix_hash that anchors cache-prefix stability.

nodes.name: ModelResolutionEntry
nodes.summary: Cascade-resolution audit record with level, requested/resolved model ids, reason, timezone-aware timestamp, and SHA-256 cache_prefix_hash validators.

nodes.name: run_state.py
nodes.summary: RunState — the top-level run state model encoding the five reproducibility invariants: byte-for-byte replay, frozen graph version, sanctum snapshot identity, model selection trail, and documented temperature variance.

nodes.name: RunState
nodes.summary: Top-level LangGraph run state: run id, status, graph version allow-list, temperature, model resolution trail, sanctum and Marcus fingerprints, story states, cache state, and production envelope, with UUID4, timezone, and completion invariant validators.

nodes.name: run_state_validators.py
nodes.summary: Standalone cross-field validator for RunState enforcing that status 'complete' requires completed_at (and vice versa), lifted out so tests can exercise it without constructing a full RunState.

nodes.name: enforce_complete_requires_completed_at
nodes.summary: Raises ValueError when RunState status and completed_at disagree: complete without a timestamp, or a timestamp without complete status.

nodes.name: perception_harness.py
nodes.summary: A2 perception eval harness comparing realtime vs batch vision perception arms over frozen fixture slides: scores non-vacuous perception fields per arm, computes deltas, and writes a JSON compare report. Eval sidecar only — it never mutates production routing.

nodes.name: SlideScore
nodes.summary: Per-slide, per-arm perception score dataclass (title/text presence, visual element count, confidence) with a non_vacuous check.

nodes.name: CompareReport
nodes.summary: Serializable report dataclass aggregating realtime and batch slide scores, field deltas, the both-arms-non-vacuous verdict, and notes.

nodes.name: score_perception
nodes.summary: Scores a single perception response (typed or raw mapping) into a SlideScore, checking title, extracted text, layout, visual element count, and confidence.

nodes.name: compare_arm_scores
nodes.summary: Compares realtime vs batch SlideScores field by field, accumulating ScoreDeltas and the both-arms-non-vacuous verdict into a CompareReport.

nodes.name: run_live_compare
nodes.summary: Live-evidence leg: perceives the frozen slides through both the realtime provider (perceive_png) and the vision batch pipeline, scores both arms, and writes the compare report.

nodes.name: contract.py
nodes.summary: Canonical 9-node specialist scaffold contract — the production-side authority defining the required LangGraph node set every specialist graph must expose, plus discovery and conformance validation helpers. Moved out of tests/ so production entry points never import from the test tree.

nodes.name: ScaffoldConformanceResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass reporting a specialist graph's conformance to the 9-node contract: present, missing, and extra nodes with an is_conforming check.

nodes.name: discover_specialist_ids
nodes.summary: Discovers specialist package ids by listing non-underscore directories under the specialists root.

nodes.name: build_specialist_graph
nodes.summary: Dynamically imports app.specialists.<id>.graph and invokes its build_<id>_graph builder to construct the specialist subgraph.

nodes.name: validate_scaffold
nodes.summary: Validates a built subgraph's node set against the canonical 9-node contract, returning a ScaffoldConformanceResult.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Canonical 9-node scaffold graph template used by the specialist generator: stub receive/plan/act/verify/reflect/emit_spans/gate_decision/finalize/handoff nodes wired through a reachability-asserted transition table, with the gate_decision node pausing via LangGraph interrupt.
nodes.languageNotes: Asserts full node reachability with a BFS over the declared TRANSITIONS tuple before building the StateGraph, so a wiring typo fails at import.

nodes.name: _assert_transition_reachability
nodes.summary: BFS over the declared transition table verifying every canonical node is reachable from receive and that handoff is terminal, raising RuntimeError otherwise.

nodes.name: build_scaffold_graph
nodes.summary: Builds the canonical 9-node LangGraph StateGraph over RunState, adding all scaffold nodes and transitions and asserting the node set matches the contract.

nodes.name: figure_tokens.py
nodes.summary: Shared regex-based numeric figure token extraction and normalization (money, percentages, multipliers with thousands-separator surface forms) used by narration and perception fidelity gates to match spoken figures against slide figures.
nodes.languageNotes: The comma-group regex requires at least one ',xxx' group so '$1200' is never truncated to '$120'; hybrid '$ 5%' spans are matched percent-first.

nodes.name: _figures
nodes.summary: Extracts all numeric figure token spans (money, percent, multiplier) from a text via the shared figure regex.

nodes.name: _normalize_figure
nodes.summary: Normalizes a raw figure token into a canonical comparable form, handling currency symbols, unit suffixes (trillion/billion), percent signs, and multiplier notation.

nodes.name: _figure_near_match
nodes.summary: Determines whether two normalized figure tokens are near-matches, tolerating surface-form variance while preserving numeric precision guarantees.

nodes.name: voice_direction_map.py
nodes.summary: Frozen pure-leaf mapper from directed-voice direction (tone/pace/energy) to ElevenLabs TTS settings, plus caller-driven default loaders implementing the Marcus control-card 5-tier voice-id precedence. Single source of truth shared by Enrique TTS dispatch and Storyboard B display parity.
nodes.languageNotes: The direction table is loaded once at import into a recursively-immutable MappingProxyType constant; the mapper does no per-call file I/O, preserving cache-prefix purity. Import-linter fenced against app.marcus.

nodes.name: _load_map
nodes.summary: Loads the tone/pace/energy to TTS-settings table from disk once at import and freezes it into the immutable VOICE_DIRECTION_MAP constant.

nodes.name: normalize_optional_str
nodes.summary: Normalizes an optional string input (trim, lowercase, empty-to-None) for direction and tier lookups.

nodes.name: load_style_guide_tts_defaults
nodes.summary: Caller-driven loader for tier-5 TTS defaults from state/config/style_guide.yaml, kept outside the pure mapper so mapper purity is preserved.

nodes.name: clean_default_tier
nodes.summary: Sanitizes a caller-supplied default-tier settings dict down to the supported TTS keys with validated values.

nodes.name: resolve_voice_id_with_source
nodes.summary: Resolves the effective ElevenLabs voice id through the 5-tier precedence chain, returning both the winning id and which tier sourced it.

nodes.name: map_voice_direction_to_tts
nodes.summary: Pure mapper: given a voice direction and caller-passed tier defaults, produces the final ElevenLabs TTS settings (stability, similarity, style, speed) from the frozen direction table with tiered fallbacks.

nodes.name: voice_provider_text.py
nodes.summary: Pure-leaf TAG-ONLY ElevenLabs eleven_v3 provider-text compiler: assembles allowlisted audio tags onto canonical narration under the fidelity firewall invariant strip_tags(provider_text) == canonical_text. Includes rhetorical-source containment audits so no spoken token is introduced beyond canonical text.
nodes.languageNotes: v3 sibling of the frozen v2 numeric mapper; never calls an LLM and never authors words — the tag channel is the only additive surface.

nodes.name: strip_tags
nodes.summary: Strips all audio tag markup from provider text, recovering the canonical narration used to verify the tag-only invariant.

nodes.name: assert_no_tag_leak
nodes.summary: Raises VoiceProviderTextError if tag-like markup remains in text that must be tag-free, protecting the display and canonical channels.

nodes.name: compile_provider_text
nodes.summary: Compiles canonical narration plus a voice direction into eleven_v3 provider text by inserting allowlisted tags, enforcing the strip_tags round-trip invariant before returning.

nodes.name: build_text_channels
nodes.summary: Builds the parallel text channels (canonical, provider, display) for a narration segment with per-channel hashes for parity checking.

nodes.name: audit_rhetorical_source_containment
nodes.summary: Audits that every spoken word in rhetorically-directed provider text is contained in the canonical source narration, reporting any escapee tokens.

nodes.name: assert_rhetorical_source_containment
nodes.summary: Raising wrapper over the containment audit: fails with a tagged VoiceProviderTextError when provider text introduces tokens absent from canonical narration.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Generated 9-node scaffold graph for the Aria specialist: decodes the operator-instructions envelope, assembles a build spec, and invokes the cascade-resolved chat model in the act node, pausing at gate_decision via LangGraph interrupt.

nodes.name: _decode_envelope_payload
nodes.summary: Decodes and validates the specialist envelope payload JSON from run state, raising a typed parse error on malformed content.

nodes.name: _parse_operator_instructions_envelope
nodes.summary: Parses the operator-instructions envelope into the fields Aria needs, raising OperatorInstructionsParseError when required keys are missing.

nodes.name: _assemble_build_spec
nodes.summary: Assembles Aria's build specification prompt block from parsed operator instructions.

nodes.name: _act
nodes.summary: Aria act node: resolves the chat model via make_chat_model, invokes the LLM against the assembled build spec, and records the contribution and model-resolution entry on run state.

nodes.name: build_aria_graph
nodes.summary: Builds Aria's canonical 9-node LangGraph StateGraph and asserts scaffold-contract conformance.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Creative-director (CD) specialist graph: reads sanctum references under a sanctum lock, assembles the CD prompt with profile targets, parses and canonicalizes the CD directive from the LLM, and resolves the styleguide selection from the styleguide projection with typed error records.

nodes.name: _assemble_cd_prompt
nodes.summary: Assembles the CD system/user prompt from sanctum references, extracted source, and the profile-targets block.

nodes.name: _canonicalize_cd_directive
nodes.summary: Canonicalizes the parsed CD directive into its stable, digest-ready form (key ordering, scrubbed SSOT paths, normalized values).

nodes.name: _styleguide_resolution_from_projection
nodes.summary: Resolves the operative styleguide selection from the styleguide projection: binds guide entries, validates parity with the resolver, and produces typed error records for every failure mode instead of silently defaulting.

nodes.name: _parse_cd_directive
nodes.summary: Parses the LLM's raw CD response into the CD directive structure, extracting embedded JSON and raising CdDirectiveParseError with a raw excerpt on failure.

nodes.name: _act
nodes.summary: CD act node: enforces the sanctum lock, assembles the prompt, invokes the cascade-resolved chat model, parses and canonicalizes the directive, resolves the styleguide, and writes the contribution to run state.

nodes.name: build_cd_graph
nodes.summary: Builds the CD specialist's canonical 9-node LangGraph StateGraph and asserts scaffold-contract conformance.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel for the Compositor deterministic assembly specialist, exporting build_compositor_graph.

nodes.name: _act.py
nodes.summary: Compositor Class-D2 deterministic assembly pipeline: decodes the bundle payload, syncs visual and motion assets into the bundle, regenerates the assembly guide with field masking and hashing, and runs the full deterministic pipeline with no LLM involvement.
nodes.languageNotes: Field-masked hashing (field-mask.yaml) lets the guide be re-derived and compared while volatile fields are excluded.

nodes.name: sync_visuals
nodes.summary: Copies visual and motion asset files referenced by the bundle rows into the assembly bundle directory.

nodes.name: regenerate_assembly_guide
nodes.summary: Regenerates the assembly guide from the bundle, applies the field mask, and computes the masked hash used to prove deterministic equivalence.

nodes.name: run_compositor_pipeline
nodes.summary: Runs the full deterministic compositor pipeline over the decoded payload: asset sync, guide regeneration, and masked-hash verification.

nodes.name: act
nodes.summary: Compositor act entry point invoked by the graph's act node: decodes the envelope and runs the deterministic pipeline, recording the trail entry.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Compositor specialist graph wiring the deterministic _act pipeline into the canonical 9-node scaffold, writing specialist summary artifacts and pausing at gate_decision.

nodes.name: build_compositor_graph
nodes.summary: Builds the Compositor's canonical 9-node LangGraph StateGraph and asserts scaffold-contract conformance.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Frozen set of every envelope payload key the Compositor's deterministic assembly consumes; Ratchet-D asserts node-14 dependency projections use only keys declared here.

nodes.name: _act.py
nodes.summary: Dan Class-D1 LLM-only creative-director aux implementation: decodes the envelope, reads the Dan sanctum digest, assembles the aux prompt, invokes the chat model, and parses strict-JSON advisory G1/G1A/G2 contributions that never block gates.

nodes.name: decode_envelope_payload
nodes.summary: Decodes and validates Dan's specialist envelope payload JSON from run state.

nodes.name: assemble_dan_prompt
nodes.summary: Assembles Dan's user prompt from the decoded payload context for the advisory contribution call.

nodes.name: parse_aux_contributions
nodes.summary: Parses Dan's LLM response into validated G1/G1A/G2 advisory prose contributions, extracting embedded JSON and raising DanAuxParseError on malformed output.

nodes.name: act
nodes.summary: Dan act entry point: assembles the prompt, invokes the provided chat model, parses aux contributions, and records the dispatch trail entry and cache state.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Dan creative-director aux specialist graph wiring the _act implementation and cascade-resolved chat model into the canonical 9-node scaffold with specialist summary artifacts.

nodes.name: build_dan_graph
nodes.summary: Builds Dan's canonical 9-node LangGraph StateGraph and asserts scaffold-contract conformance.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Desmond descript-assembly specialist graph: reads sanctum references under a sanctum lock, assembles the Desmond prompt, invokes the cascade-resolved chat model, and parses the structured handoff from the LLM response with typed HandoffParseError failures.

nodes.name: assert_sanctum_lock
nodes.summary: Verifies the Desmond sanctum manifest digest matches the fingerprint captured at run start, raising a sanctum-lock violation on drift.

nodes.name: _assemble_desmond_prompt
nodes.summary: Assembles Desmond's prompt from sanctum references and the decoded envelope payload.

nodes.name: _parse_handoff
nodes.summary: Parses the LLM response into Desmond's structured descript-assembly handoff, validating required fields and raising HandoffParseError with diagnostics on malformed output.

nodes.name: _act
nodes.summary: Desmond act node: enforces the sanctum lock, invokes the cascade-resolved chat model against the assembled prompt, parses the handoff, and records the contribution on run state.

nodes.name: build_desmond_graph
nodes.summary: Builds Desmond's canonical 9-node LangGraph StateGraph and asserts scaffold-contract conformance.

nodes.name: dispatch_errors.py
nodes.summary: Shared base for typed specialist dispatch errors: the production runner catches SpecialistDispatchError to convert transient dispatch failures into recoverable error-pauses instead of killing the trial; all per-seam fail-loud error classes re-base here.

nodes.name: SpecialistDispatchError
nodes.summary: Typed, taggable specialist dispatch failure base class (fail-loud policy); the tag routes recovery behavior in the production runner.

nodes.name: _act.py
nodes.summary: Enrique Class-C ElevenLabs TTS act implementation: builds the operator voice-selection contract, resolves the directed-voice plan through the shared voice mappers, synthesizes per-segment audio via the ElevenLabs client, measures durations, writes VTT files, and assembles the full audio assembly bundle with reusable receipts and the compositor invocation.
nodes.languageNotes: Largest act implementation in the batch (~1000 lines); build_assembly_bundle alone spans ~290 lines and carries the paid-run receipt-reuse economy.

nodes.name: build_voice_selection_contract
nodes.summary: Builds the operator-facing voice selection contract: candidate voices with names, preview URLs, and the recommended voice id for the gate decision surface.

nodes.name: _segments
nodes.summary: Extracts the ordered narration segments (ids, text, slide bindings) from the Irene contribution payload for TTS synthesis.

nodes.name: _DirectedPlan
nodes.summary: Internal plan object capturing the resolved directed-voice rendering strategy per segment: provider text, TTS settings, voice id and source tier.

nodes.name: _resolve_directed_plan
nodes.summary: Resolves the per-segment directed-voice plan: maps voice direction to TTS settings via the frozen mapper, compiles v3 provider text through the tag-only compiler, and applies the 5-tier voice-id precedence.

nodes.name: _reusable_receipt
nodes.summary: Checks for a prior synthesis receipt matching the segment's text/settings hash so already-paid ElevenLabs audio is reused instead of re-synthesized.

nodes.name: build_assembly_bundle
nodes.summary: Core bundle builder: synthesizes or reuses per-segment ElevenLabs audio, measures MP3 durations, writes VTT caption files, records receipts and economics, and assembles the audio bundle manifest consumed by the Compositor.

nodes.name: generate_enrique_outputs
nodes.summary: Top-level output generator combining the assembly bundle and the compositor invocation payload for Enrique's contribution.

nodes.name: act
nodes.summary: Enrique act entry point invoked by the graph: decodes the envelope, generates outputs, and records the dispatch trail entry with typed EnriqueActError failures.

nodes.name: elevenlabs_dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Importlib-based dispatch seam that loads the ElevenLabs operations script from skills/elevenlabs-audio and routes Enrique's voice-preview, narration, sfx, and music requests to it, wrapping failures in ElevenlabsDispatchError.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses importlib.util plus synthetic package stubs to load a script outside the app package without polluting sys.path.

nodes.name: dispatch_to_elevenlabs
nodes.summary: Validates the requested mode against the allowed Enrique modes, dynamically loads the ElevenLabs operations module, executes the operation payload, and normalizes API errors into tagged dispatch exceptions.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Enrique (ElevenLabs audio) specialist's 9-node scaffold-conformant LangGraph graph: receive/plan/act/verify/reflect/emit_spans/gate_decision/finalize/handoff nodes wired over RunState with sanctum-digest and references loading.

nodes.name: build_enrique_graph
nodes.summary: Assembles and compiles the Enrique specialist StateGraph, registering the nine scaffold nodes and their fixed transitions.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Ratchet-D consumed-payload contract for Enrique: the frozenset of every envelope key his act body reads (segments, voice selection, bundle path, directed-voice defaults), pinning the cache_prefix-only starvation defect.

nodes.name: _act.py
nodes.summary: Gary's act body: normalizes Gamma generation settings from the envelope and styleguide, generates Classic and Studio slide-deck variants via the Gamma client, emits styleguide-parity receipts, and partitions binary-fidelity cohorts for per-slide calls.
nodes.languageNotes: The 240-line _normalized_gamma_settings funnels every styleguide/envelope surface through a single validated settings dict before any billable Gamma call.

nodes.name: _normalized_gamma_settings
nodes.summary: Merges envelope payload, resolved styleguide, and defaults into one validated Gamma generation settings dict, enforcing enum surfaces and classic-vs-studio key partitions.

nodes.name: _generate_studio_variant
nodes.summary: Generates a Studio-mode Gamma variant with per-slide single-card calls, asserting each returned card is a valid image card before accepting it.

nodes.name: _styleguide_parity_receipt
nodes.summary: Builds the anti-drift parity receipt comparing Gary's local styleguide resolution against the shared app.styleguide.parity comparison, recording digests and classification.

nodes.name: _classic_generation_kwargs
nodes.summary: Assembles the keyword arguments for a Classic-mode Gamma generation call from the normalized settings and per-variant theme, text, image, and card options.

nodes.name: generate_gamma_variants
nodes.summary: Top-level variant generation loop: partitions slides into fidelity cohorts, drives Classic and Studio Gamma generations per variant, collects receipts, and returns the dispatch trail with parity evidence.

nodes.name: act
nodes.summary: Gary's act entry point: decodes the envelope payload, runs generate_gamma_variants, and returns the updated RunState with cache and resolution entries.

nodes.name: gamma_dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Thin dispatch seam for Gary's Gamma generation: routes to the gamma_api_mastery execute_generation skill script, falls back to a deterministic fixture receipt for non-billing paths, and raises GammaDispatchError on pre-receipt failures.

nodes.name: dispatch_to_gamma
nodes.summary: Executes a Gamma generation via the skill-layer execute_generation or returns the fixture receipt when no live context is provided, normalizing errors into GammaDispatchError.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Gary (Gamma slides) specialist's 9-node scaffold graph, adding dispatch-trail entries, envelope decoding, and strict dispatch-receipt parsing (ReceiptParseError) around the standard receive-through-handoff pipeline.

nodes.name: _parse_dispatch_receipt
nodes.summary: Strictly parses and validates the Gamma dispatch receipt JSON, raising tagged ReceiptParseError on missing or malformed fields so bad receipts fail loud instead of propagating.

nodes.name: build_gary_graph
nodes.summary: Assembles and compiles the Gary specialist StateGraph with the nine scaffold nodes and fixed transitions.

nodes.name: learned_dependencies.py
nodes.summary: Hermetic learned-dependencies store for the CD-owned Gamma styleguide: an append-only digest-idempotent JSONL observation ledger plus a manifest-pinned promoted-rules layer, with offline predicate evaluation and manifest-pin verification. Ships zero active rules by design.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately file-based (JSONL + YAML lock) rather than the Postgres event ledger, so validation runs offline with no DB or network.

nodes.name: apply_learned_rules
nodes.summary: Evaluates active learned rules' predicates against a resolved settings dict and applies matching rule effects, returning the adjusted settings and an application trail.

nodes.name: append_observation
nodes.summary: Appends a candidate observation row to the JSONL ledger idempotently by content digest, so re-runs produce byte-identical ledgers.

nodes.name: check_manifest_pin
nodes.summary: Verifies the promoted-rules YAML block against the identity-manifest lock file, failing loud when a promoted rule vanished, mutated, or lacks provenance.

nodes.name: active_learned_rules
nodes.summary: Loads the manifest and returns the currently active promoted rules after pin verification; empty by design until the CD promotion ceremony lands.

nodes.name: styleguide_library.py
nodes.summary: Byte-compatible barrel re-export of the shared Gamma styleguide resolver (app.styleguide.resolver), preserving Gary's full prior public API after the strangler-fig move so every existing import site keeps working unchanged.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Irene specialist package entry point re-exporting build_irene_graph plus the IreneEnvelope and IreneReturn state contracts.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel for the Irene Pass-2 authoring contract, re-exporting the Pydantic envelope models, enums, and perception projection helper from pass_2_template.

nodes.name: pass_2_template.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic source of truth for Irene Pass-2 authoring guidance: strict models for slide output, perception artifacts, voice direction, segment manifests, and the IrenePass2AuthoringEnvelope with cross-artifact shape validation.
nodes.languageNotes: Pydantic v2 Rust-regex lacks negative lookahead, so PNG path validation rejects URL schemes via a no-colons-except-drive-prefix pattern (operator-ratified trade-off).

nodes.name: IrenePass2AuthoringEnvelope
nodes.summary: Top-level strict authoring envelope validating generated_at UTC-awareness, procedural-rule completeness, and cross-artifact shape consistency across slides, perception artifacts, and segment manifest.

nodes.name: VoiceDirection
nodes.summary: Delivery-metadata model for directed voice (pace, emphasis, tone fields) with sequence-to-tuple coercion; the Step-1 contract consumed by the post-freeze annotation pass.

nodes.name: SegmentManifestSegment
nodes.summary: Per-segment manifest row model (narration text, visual file, behavioral intent) with visual-file normalization used by the Pass-2 segment manifest.

nodes.name: GarySlideOutput
nodes.summary: Strict model for a Gary-produced slide artifact, enforcing that file_path is a local PNG via the colon-restricted path pattern.

nodes.name: project_rich_perception_for_authoring
nodes.summary: Projects the rich app.models.perception.PerceptionArtifact down to the minimal authoring-envelope PerceptionArtifact for template and validator compatibility.

nodes.name: voice_direction_annotation.py
nodes.summary: Pure, deterministic post-freeze voice-direction annotation pass (P5 Step 2): layers voice_direction delivery metadata onto an already-frozen figure-gate-passed segment manifest without touching any grounded field, with override > defaults > role-seed > built-in precedence.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately separated from the LLM Pass-2 call so delivery intent can never leak into word choice; deep-copies segments and adds only the voice_direction key.

nodes.name: annotate_segments_with_voice_direction
nodes.summary: Annotates each frozen segment with a resolved VoiceDirection using the override/defaults/seed precedence chain, verifying no grounded field is mutated and raising VoiceDirectionError with offending locations otherwise.

nodes.name: warm_callback.py
nodes.summary: Pure deterministic warm-callback safety core: computes the grounded anchor denominator from pedagogy annotations (teaches-after intersected with teachable) and gates callbacks block-by-omission via the Vera-R7 rhetorical-source-containment audit; no LLM involved.
nodes.languageNotes: STRIP is forbidden by design — a failed gate drops the whole callback rather than silently altering canonical text, preserving the VO/on-screen invariant.

nodes.name: select_grounded_callback_anchors
nodes.summary: Computes the strictly-prior teachable parent component_ids a warm callback may legitimately reference, from compute_teaches_after intersected with derive_teachable; returns an empty tuple fail-safe when nothing qualifies.

nodes.name: gate_warm_callback
nodes.summary: Vera-R7 gate with teeth: runs assert_rhetorical_source_containment plus the frozen figure_tokens no-new-figure check and returns kept=False with the audit on failure so the caller drops the callback entirely.

nodes.name: warm_callback_authoring.py
nodes.summary: Warm-callback generative half: the default-OFF env feature flag and the injectable renderer seam whose prompt structurally forbids numerals, comparators, and negations so polarity reversal is unreachable by construction, with the Vera-R7 gate as runtime backstop.

nodes.name: build_warm_callback_render_messages
nodes.summary: Builds the chat messages for the warm-callback renderer, constraining the callback to reference the prior concept only — no figures, comparators, negations, or new claims.

nodes.name: render_warm_callback
nodes.summary: Injectable renderer seam: invokes the supplied model_invoke callable (real gpt-5 chat in the live path, deterministic fake in unit tests) on the render messages and returns the callback text.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Irene Pass-2 specialist's 9-node scaffold graph and narration-authoring core: assembles the deterministic Pass-2 prompt, invokes the LLM, then enforces the figure-fidelity and reading-path invariants (narration joins roster, figures sourced from perception, redaction of unperceived figures) and attaches voice direction and warm callbacks post-freeze.
nodes.languageNotes: Prompt assembly is pinned byte-stable (sorted sanctum paths, canonical JSON, no clocks/UUIDs) so cache prefixes are reproducible; the envelope rides in cache_state.cache_prefix as a documented Slab-2 carrier hack.

nodes.name: build_irene_graph
nodes.summary: Assembles and compiles the Irene specialist StateGraph with the nine scaffold nodes and fixed transitions.

nodes.name: _act
nodes.summary: Act-node dispatcher that decodes the envelope and routes to _act_pass_1 or _act_pass_2 based on the pass_phase payload key.

nodes.name: _act_pass_1
nodes.summary: Legacy Pass-1 act path: assembles the lesson-plan prompt, invokes the chat model, and parses the Pass-1 response into the run state.

nodes.name: _act_pass_2
nodes.summary: Pass-2 act path: assembles the byte-stable narration prompt, invokes the LLM, parses and validates the authoring envelope, then runs the post-freeze pipeline — grounding assertions, slide-key stamping, voice-direction attachment, and warm-callback attachment.

nodes.name: _assemble_pass_2_prompt
nodes.summary: Deterministically assembles the Pass-2 narration prompt from sanctum digest, references, payload sections, perceived-figure blocks, and reading-path guidance — byte-identical for byte-identical inputs (cache-prefix stability contract).

nodes.name: _attach_warm_callbacks
nodes.summary: Wires the warm-callback authoring step into Pass-2: selects grounded anchors, renders callbacks via the injectable renderer, gates each through the Vera-R7 containment gate, and injects survivors into the canonical segment manifest with role restamping.

nodes.name: _attach_voice_direction
nodes.summary: Runs the pure post-freeze voice-direction annotation over the frozen segment manifest when the directed-voice flag is on, threading defaults, overrides, and role-derived per-slide seeds.

nodes.name: assert_pass2_surfaces_validatable
nodes.summary: Public precondition check that the Pass-2 output surfaces (roster, deltas, segment manifest) are shaped well enough for the grounding assertions to run, failing loud otherwise.

nodes.name: _assert_narration_figures_sourced
nodes.summary: Figure-fidelity gate: asserts every numeral spoken in narration is sourced from perceived slide figures or the source-figure authority, raising Pass2GroundingError with cited offenders.

nodes.name: backfill_delta_ids
nodes.summary: Backfills stable delta identifiers onto segment-manifest deltas so downstream joins (join-id integrity assertion, Enrique consumption) have deterministic keys.

nodes.name: _slide_roster
nodes.summary: Builds the authoritative slide roster from the envelope's gary_slide_output and lesson plan, the join surface every narration segment must map onto.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Ratchet-D consumed-payload contract for Irene Pass-2: the frozenset of envelope keys her act body reads (lesson_plan, gary_slide_output, perception_artifacts, slide_briefs, directed-voice inputs), pinning the ungrounded-prompt starvation defect.

nodes.name: cluster_floor.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic split-only min_cluster_floor engine for the real Pass-1 surface: derives legitimate seams from verbatim source_refs anchors (figure/narration/claim roles), splits contiguous cluster runs to meet the floor without minting units or changing content, and fails loud under the veto discipline when anchors are unverifiable.
nodes.languageNotes: Split products get freshly minted cluster ids because the floor arbiter counts distinct clusters — same-id interstitial growth would make the floor unfalsifiable.

nodes.name: honor_min_cluster_floor
nodes.summary: Main floor-honoring entry: counts clusters, finds bondable seams across runs, and performs the minimum number of splits needed to reach the floor, raising typed errors when the deficit is unmeetable or the config is dead/invalid.

nodes.name: consume_min_cluster_floor
nodes.summary: Reads and validates the min_cluster_floor styleguide setting into a FloorConsumption record, marking it consulted so assert_floor_consulted can verify the floor was not silently skipped.

nodes.name: assert_floor_consulted
nodes.summary: Asserts the floor configuration was actually consulted during the run, preventing dead-config drift where a declared floor silently stops enforcing.

nodes.name: _split_run
nodes.summary: Splits a contiguous cluster run at a chosen seam: promotes the trailing unit to head of a newly minted cluster, re-parents followers as interstitials, and recounts interstitial counts — reshaping boundaries only.

nodes.name: _run_seams
nodes.summary: Enumerates candidate seams inside a cluster run and keeps only those whose adjacent anchor roles prove the seam is not bonded (figure-narration atomicity), applying the zero-seams veto for unverifiable anchor sets.

nodes.name: flatten_plan_content
nodes.summary: Flattens plan_units to their content sequence — the byte-identity invariant surface proving splits never alter content (the 07G VO/on-screen guard in unit form).

nodes.name: classify_anchor_role
nodes.summary: Deterministically classifies a source anchor into the fixed {figure, narration, claim} vocabulary from image/narration markers or a frozen figure_tokens numeral hit.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Irene Pass-1 specialist's 9-node scaffold graph delegating its act node to the irene_pass1._act module (lesson-plan planning pass) over the standard receive-through-handoff transitions.

nodes.name: build_irene_pass1_graph
nodes.summary: Assembles and compiles the Irene Pass-1 StateGraph with the nine scaffold nodes and fixed transitions.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Kim specialist's 9-node scaffold graph: parses the operator-instructions envelope and assembles course-arc instructions in its act node, with tagged OperatorInstructionsParseError on malformed envelopes.

nodes.name: build_kim_graph
nodes.summary: Assembles and compiles the Kim specialist StateGraph with the nine scaffold nodes and fixed transitions.

nodes.name: _parse_operator_instructions_envelope
nodes.summary: Decodes and validates Kim's operator-instructions envelope payload, raising tagged OperatorInstructionsParseError when required fields are missing or malformed.

nodes.name: _assemble_coursearc_instructions
nodes.summary: Builds the course-arc instruction text from the parsed operator instructions for downstream consumption.

nodes.name: _act
nodes.summary: Kim's act node: parses the operator-instructions envelope, assembles course-arc instructions, and records the result plus a dispatch-trail entry on the run state.

nodes.name: _act.py
nodes.summary: Kira's act body: loads the per-slide motion plan (inline dict, YAML path, or upstream delivery), enforces the motion budget, generates text-to-video clips sequentially via the Kling client, and writes motion receipts and inspection artifacts into the run bundle.

nodes.name: generate_motion_from_plan
nodes.summary: Iterates the motion plan's slides sequentially, estimates cost against the budget, calls the Kling generation per slide, and accumulates per-slide receipts, video URLs, and inspection notes.

nodes.name: _call_generate_motion
nodes.summary: Invokes the Kling motion-generation backend for a single slide's prompt and model, normalizing failures into tagged KiraActError.

nodes.name: _load_motion_plan
nodes.summary: Resolves the motion plan from the payload's inline motion_plan dict, a motion_plan_path YAML file, a top-level slides list, or the tolerated upstream_output delivery, in that precedence.

nodes.name: act
nodes.summary: Kira's act entry point: decodes the envelope payload, runs generate_motion_from_plan, and returns the updated RunState with receipts and trail entries.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Kira (Kling text-to-video) specialist's 9-node scaffold graph with sanctum-digest and references loading over the standard receive-through-handoff transitions.

nodes.name: build_kira_graph
nodes.summary: Assembles and compiles the Kira specialist StateGraph with the nine scaffold nodes and fixed transitions.

nodes.name: kling_dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Thin dispatch seam for Kira motion generation: loads the kling-video skill's run_motion_generation script via importlib for real runs, and returns a deterministic fixture MP4 path when no runtime motion-plan context is provided (non-billing default).

nodes.name: dispatch_to_kling
nodes.summary: Routes a motion-generation request to the real Kling backend when motion_plan_path and slide_id are supplied, otherwise returns the fixture MP4; wraps failures in KlingDispatchError.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Ratchet-D consumed-payload contract for Kira: the frozenset of envelope keys her act reads (motion_plan, motion_plan_path, slides, bundle_path, upstream_output), published to lift 07E out of the manifest-vocabulary quarantine.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Mira specialist's 9-node scaffold graph: parses the operator-instructions envelope and assembles a prompt pack in its act node, mirroring Kim's structure with tagged parse errors.

nodes.name: build_mira_graph
nodes.summary: Assembles and compiles the Mira specialist StateGraph with the nine scaffold nodes and fixed transitions.

nodes.name: _parse_operator_instructions_envelope
nodes.summary: Decodes and validates Mira's operator-instructions envelope payload, raising tagged OperatorInstructionsParseError on malformed input.

nodes.name: _assemble_prompt_pack
nodes.summary: Builds Mira's prompt pack from the parsed operator instructions for downstream consumption.

nodes.name: _act
nodes.summary: Mira's act node: parses the operator-instructions envelope, assembles the prompt pack, and records the result plus a dispatch-trail entry on the run state.

nodes.name: _act.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic 07D.5 motion-plan producer: adapts the Epic-14 motion engine over the quinn_r authorized winner deck, auto- or override-designates video/animation slides, fuses prompts from the proven video-style catalog, validates model ids against model-capabilities, and projects the result into Kira's motion_plan shape — no LLM or model client touched.
nodes.languageNotes: The no-model-client rule is a binding party amendment pinned as a test invariant; skills/kling-video/references is the SSOT for prompt templates and valid model ids.

nodes.name: build_motion_plan
nodes.summary: Top-level producer: resolves the authorized storyboard, applies designations, builds the Epic-14 recommendation plan, projects designated slides into Kira's motion_plan shape with fused prompts, valid model ids, and estimated costs.

nodes.name: _project_slides
nodes.summary: Projects video/animation-designated recommendation rows into per-slide motion_plan entries with motion_prompt, model_name, image path, and estimated_cost_usd.

nodes.name: _resolve_authorized_storyboard
